30314.title: Social Capital II: Determinants of Economic Connectedness
30314.zh_title: 社会资本 II：经济关联性的决定因素
30314.authors: Raj Chetty, Matthew O. Jackson, Theresa Kuchler, Johannes Stroebel, Nathaniel Hendren, Robert B. Fluegge, Sara Gong, Federico Gonzalez, Armelle Grondin, Matthew Jacob, Drew Johnston, Martin Koenen, Eduardo Laguna-Muggenburg, Florian Mudekereza, Tom Rutter, Nicolaj Thor, Wilbur Townsend, Ruby Zhang, Mike Bailey, Pablo Barberá, Monica Bhole, Nils Wernerfelt
30314.abstract: Low levels of social interaction across class lines have generated widespread concern and are associated with worse outcomes, such as lower rates of upward income mobility. Here, we analyze the determinants of cross-class interaction using data from Facebook, building upon the analysis in the first paper in this series. We show that about half of the social disconnection across socioeconomic lines—measured as the difference in the share of high-socioeconomic status (SES) friends between low- and high-SES people—is explained by differences in exposure to high- SES people in groups such as schools and religious organizations. The other half is explained by friending bias—the tendency for low-SES people to befriend high-SES people at lower rates even conditional on exposure. Friending bias is shaped by the structure of the groups in which people interact. For example, friending bias is higher in larger and more diverse groups and lower in religious organizations than in schools and workplaces. Distinguishing exposure from friending bias is helpful for identifying interventions to increase cross-SES friendships (economic connectedness). Using fluctuations in the share of high-SES students across high school cohorts, we show that increases in high-SES exposure lead low-SES people to form more friendships with high-SES people in schools that exhibit low levels of friending bias. Hence, socioeconomic integration can increase economic connectedness in communities where friending bias is low. In contrast, when friending bias is high, increasing cross-SES interaction among existing members may be necessary to increase economic connectedness. To support such efforts, we release privacy-protected statistics on economic connectedness, exposure, and friending bias for each ZIP code, high school, and college in the U.S. at www.socialcapital.org.
30314.zh_abstract: 跨阶层社会互动水平低下引发了广泛担忧，并与收入向上流动性降低等更差的结果相关。在此，我们利用Facebook的数据，基于本系列第一篇论文的分析，研究了跨阶层互动的决定因素。我们发现，约一半的社会经济断层（以低社会经济地位人群与高社会经济地位人群之间，拥有高社会经济地位朋友比例的差异来衡量）可归因于在学校和宗教组织等群体中接触高社会经济地位人群的差异。另一半则归因于交友偏差——即低社会经济地位人群即使在接触条件相同的情况下，与高社会经济地位人群交友的倾向也较低。交友偏差受到人们互动群体结构的影响。例如，在规模更大、更多元化的群体中，交友偏差更高；而在宗教组织中，交友偏差低于学校和工作场所。区分接触与交友偏差有助于识别增加跨社会经济地位友谊（经济关联性）的干预措施。利用高中年级队列中高社会经济地位学生比例的波动，我们发现在交友偏差水平较低的学校，高社会经济地位接触的增加会导致低社会经济地位人群与高社会经济地位人群建立更多友谊。因此，在交友偏差较低的社区，社会经济融合可以增加经济关联性。相反，当交友偏差较高时，可能需要增加现有成员之间的跨社会经济地位互动，以提高经济关联性。为支持此类努力，我们在www.socialcapital.org上发布了美国每个邮政编码区、高中和大学的经济关联性、接触和交友偏差的隐私保护统计数据。
30314.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：J0, R0

30313.title: Social Capital I: Measurement and Associations with Economic Mobility
30313.zh_title: 社会资本 I：测量及其与经济流动性的关联
30313.authors: Raj Chetty, Matthew O. Jackson, Theresa Kuchler, Johannes Stroebel, Nathaniel Hendren, Robert B. Fluegge, Sara Gong, Federico González, Armelle Grondin, Matthew Jacob, Drew Johnston, Martin Koenen, Eduardo Laguna-Muggenburg, Florian Mudekereza, Tom Rutter, Nicolaj Thor, Wilbur Townsend, Ruby Zhang, Mike Bailey, Pablo Barberá, Monica Bhole, Nils Wernerfelt
30313.abstract: In this paper—the first in a series of two papers that use data on 21 billion friendships from Facebook to study social capital—we measure and analyze three types of social capital by ZIP code in the United States: (i) connectedness between different types of people, such as those with low vs. high socioeconomic status (SES); (ii) social cohesion, such as the extent of cliques in friendship networks; and (iii) civic engagement, such as rates of volunteering. These measures vary substantially across areas, but are not highly correlated with each other. We demonstrate the importance of distinguishing these forms of social capital by analyzing their associations with economic mobility across areas. The fraction of high-SES friends among low-SES individuals—which we term economic connectedness—is among the strongest predictors of upward income mobility identified to date, whereas other social capital measures are not strongly associated with economic mobility. If children with low-SES parents were to grow up in counties with economic connectedness comparable to that of the average child with high-SES parents, their incomes in adulthood would increase by 20% on average. Differences in economic connectedness can explain well-known relationships between upward income mobility and racial segregation, poverty rates, and inequality. To support further research and policy interventions, we publicly release privacy-protected statistics on social capital by ZIP code at www.socialcapital.org.
30313.zh_abstract: 在本文——本系列两篇论文中的第一篇，利用Facebook上210亿个友谊数据研究社会资本——中，我们测量并分析了美国按邮政编码区划分的三种社会资本：(i) 不同类型人群（如低社会经济地位与高社会经济地位人群）之间的关联性；(ii) 社会凝聚力，例如友谊网络中派系的程度；(iii) 公民参与，例如志愿服务率。这些指标在不同地区差异显著，但彼此之间相关性不高。我们通过分析它们与地区间经济流动性的关联，证明了区分这些社会资本形式的重要性。低社会经济地位个体中高社会经济地位朋友的比例——我们称之为经济关联性——是迄今为止已识别的向上收入流动性最强的预测因子之一，而其他社会资本指标与经济流动性的关联并不强。如果父母为低社会经济地位的儿童，在具有与普通高社会经济地位父母儿童相当的经济关联性的县成长，他们成年后的收入平均将增加20%。经济关联性的差异可以解释向上收入流动性与种族隔离、贫困率和不平等之间已知的关系。为支持进一步研究和政策干预，我们在www.socialcapital.org上公开发布了按邮政编码区划分的社会资本隐私保护统计数据。

30312.title: The Impact of the Clean Air Act on Particulate Matter in the 1970s.
30312.zh_title: 1970年代《清洁空气法》对颗粒物的影响
30312.authors: Maureen L. Cropper, Nicholas Z. Muller, Yongjoon Park, Victoria Perez-Zetune
30312.abstract: We examine whether counties designated as out of attainment with the National Ambient Air Quality Standards (NAAQS) under the 1970 CAA experienced larger reductions in Total Suspended Particulates (TSP) during the 1970s than attainment counties. We answer this question using the official designation of nonattainment status which, between 1972 and 1978, was by Air Quality Control Region (AQCR). Data from balanced panels of TSP monitors in operation from 1969-78 and from 1971-78 are used to examine the impact of nonattainment status on TSP. We also examine the impact of nonattainment on TSP using the definition in the literature, which designates a county as out of attainment if any of its monitors violated the NAAQS. Using the official (AQCR) nonattainment designation, TSP, on average, fell by 10.2 μg/m3 using the 1969 panel and 9.1 μg/m3 using the 1971 panel. Using the definition of nonattainment in the literature yields smaller reductions: 6.0 μg/m3 using the 1969-78 panel and 7.7 μg/m3 using the 1971-78 panel. Using the correct definition of nonattainment in difference-in-differences (DID) models calls into question whether these results can be interpreted as causal. When counties are characterized using the official nonattainment designation, the parallel trends assumption, crucial to causal inference in the DID context, is violated.
30312.zh_abstract: 我们考察了根据1970年《清洁空气法》被指定为未达到国家环境空气质量标准（NAAQS）的县，在1970年代是否比达标县经历了更大的总悬浮颗粒物（TSP）减少。我们使用1972年至1978年间按空气质量控制区（AQCR）进行的官方未达标状态指定来回答这个问题。我们利用1969-1978年和1971-1978年期间运行的TSP监测仪平衡面板数据，检验未达标状态对TSP的影响。我们还使用文献中的定义（即如果某个县的任何监测仪违反了NAAQS，则将该县指定为未达标）来检验未达标对TSP的影响。使用官方（AQCR）未达标指定，使用1969年面板，TSP平均下降了10.2 μg/m³；使用1971年面板，平均下降了9.1 μg/m³。使用文献中的未达标定义，下降幅度较小：使用1969-1978年面板为6.0 μg/m³，使用1971-1978年面板为7.7 μg/m³。在双重差分（DID）模型中使用正确的未达标定义，使这些结果是否可被解释为因果关系受到质疑。当使用官方未达标指定对县进行特征描述时，对DID背景下因果推断至关重要的平行趋势假设被违反了。

30311.title: The Race Between Education, Technology, and Institutions
30311.zh_title: 教育、技术与制度之间的竞赛
30311.abstract: I generalize the canonical model--in which relative supply and demand for worker skills shape the skill premium--incorporating monopsony power, minimum wages, and unemployment. I estimate the extended canonical model using national data and, separately, state-level data. I show that incorporating the minimum wage improves the out-of-sample fit of the traditional canonical model. I document that minimum wages--together with supply and demand--play a central role in shaping the evolution of the U.S. college premium and the differential evolution of state-level college premia. Lending credibility to these conclusions, the state and national estimates are not only qualitatively, but also quantitatively consistent.
30311.zh_abstract: 我将经典模型——其中工人技能的相对供给和需求塑造了技能溢价——进行了推广，纳入了买方垄断势力、最低工资和失业。我分别使用全国数据和州级数据估计了扩展后的经典模型。我表明，纳入最低工资改善了传统经典模型的样本外拟合度。我记录了最低工资——与供给和需求一起——在塑造美国大学溢价的演变以及州级大学溢价的差异化演变中发挥着核心作用。为这些结论提供可信度的是，州级和全国估计不仅在定性上一致，而且在定量上也一致。
30311.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, LS；JEL：E24, J0, J23, J31, J42

30310.title: Screening with Multitasking: Theory and Empirical Evidence from Teacher Tenure Reform
30310.zh_title: 多任务下的筛选：来自教师任期改革的理论与实证证据
30310.abstract: What happens when employers screen their employees but only observe a subset of output? We specify a model with heterogeneous employees and show that their response to the screening affects output in both the probationary period and the post-probationary period. The post-probationary impact is due to their heterogeneous responses affecting which individuals are retained and hence the screening efficiency. We show that the impact of the endogenous response on both the unobserved outcome and screening efficiency depends on whether increased effort on one task increases or decreases the marginal cost of effort on the other task. If the response decreases unobserved output in the probationary period then it increases the screening efficiency, and vice versa. We then assess these predictions empirically by studying a change to teacher tenure policy in New York City, which increased the role that a single measure—test score value-added—played in tenure decisions. We show that in response to the policy teachers increased test score value-added and decreased output that did not enter the tenure decision. The increase in test score value-added was largest for the teachers with more ability to improve students' untargeted outcomes, increasing their likelihood of getting tenure. We estimate that the endogenous response to the policy announcement reduced the screening efficiency gap—defined as the reduction of screening efficiency stemming from the partial observability of output—by 28%, effectively shifting some of the cost of partial observability from the post-tenure period to the pre-tenure period.
30310.zh_abstract: 当雇主筛选其员工但仅观察到部分产出时会发生什么？我们构建了一个包含异质性员工的模型，并表明他们对筛选的反应会影响试用期和试用期后的产出。试用期后的影响源于他们的异质性反应影响了哪些个体被保留，从而影响了筛选效率。我们表明，内生反应对未观测结果和筛选效率的影响取决于在一项任务上增加努力是否会增加或减少另一项任务上的边际努力成本。如果反应降低了试用期的未观测产出，那么它会提高筛选效率，反之亦然。然后，我们通过研究纽约市教师任期政策的变化来实证评估这些预测，该政策增加了单一指标——考试成绩增值——在任期决策中的作用。我们表明，作为对该政策的回应，教师提高了考试成绩增值，并减少了未进入任期决策的产出。考试成绩增值的增加在那些更有能力提高学生非目标结果的教师中最大，从而增加了他们获得任期的可能性。我们估计，对政策公告的内生反应将筛选效率差距——定义为由产出的部分可观测性导致的筛选效率降低——减少了28%，有效地将部分部分可观测性的成本从任期后时期转移到了任期前时期。
30310.meta: Programs：ED, LS；JEL：D23, I21, J08, J24, J41

30309.title: Social Protection and Social Distancing During the Pandemic: Mobile Money Transfers in Ghana
30309.zh_title: 疫情期间的社会保护与社会距离：加纳的移动货币转账
30309.authors: Dean Karlan, Matt Lowe, Robert Darko Osei, Isaac Osei-Akoto, Benjamin N. Roth, Christopher R. Udry
30309.abstract: We randomized mobile money transfers to a sample of low-income Ghanaians during the COVID-19 pandemic. Treated households received eight transfers that sum to roughly one month’s income, while control households only received one transfer. The mere announcement of upcoming transfers has null effects. Once disbursed, transfers increase contemporaneous food expenditure by 8% and income by 20%, but do not affect psychological well-being. Over 40% of the transfers are spent on food. We find suggestive evidence that transfers increased social distancing. The positive effect on income does not persist to two years after the last transfer, and surprisingly, two-year effects on consumption and psychological well-being are negative. Together, we learn that pandemic-era cash transfers can support households economically without diminishing adherence to public health protocols, though with null or negative long-term effects.
30309.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19疫情期间，我们向加纳低收入人群样本随机发放了移动货币转账。受助家庭收到了八笔总计约一个月收入的转账，而对照家庭仅收到一笔转账。仅宣布即将到来的转账没有效果。一旦发放，转账使同期食品支出增加了8%，收入增加了20%，但不影响心理健康。超过40%的转账用于食品。我们发现了转账增加了社会距离的提示性证据。对收入的积极影响并未持续到最后一笔转账后的两年，而且令人惊讶的是，两年后对消费和心理健康的影响是负面的。总之，我们了解到，疫情时期的现金转移可以在不削弱遵守公共卫生协议的情况下为家庭提供经济支持，尽管长期影响为零或负面。
30309.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H51, H84, O12

30308.title: Still Worth the Trip? School Busing Effects in Boston and New York
30308.zh_title: 仍然值得一程？波士顿和纽约的校车接送效果
30308.authors: Joshua Angrist, Guthrie Gray-Lobe, Clemence M. Idoux, Parag A. Pathak
30308.abstract: School assignment in Boston and New York City came to national attention in the 1970s as courts across the country tried to integrate schools. Today, district-wide choice allows Boston and New York students to enroll far from home, perhaps enhancing integration. Urban school transportation is increasingly costly, however, and has unclear integration and education consequences. We estimate the causal effects of non-neighborhood school enrollment and school travel on integration, achievement, and college enrollment using an identification strategy that exploits partly-random assignment in the Boston and New York school matches. Instrumental variables estimates suggest distance and travel boost integration for those who choose to travel, but have little or no effect on test scores and college attendance. We argue that small effects on educational outcomes reflect modest effects of distance and travel on school quality as measured by value-added.
30308.zh_abstract: 1970年代，当全国各地的法院试图整合学校时，波士顿和纽约市的学校分配引起了全国关注。如今，全区范围内的择校允许波士顿和纽约的学生在离家很远的地方入学，这或许能促进融合。然而，城市学校交通成本日益高昂，且其融合和教育后果尚不明确。我们利用波士顿和纽约学校匹配中部分随机分配的识别策略，估计了非邻里学校入学和学校通勤对融合、学业成绩和大学入学的因果效应。工具变量估计表明，距离和通勤促进了那些选择通勤者的融合，但对考试成绩和大学入学几乎没有影响。我们认为，对教育成果的微小影响反映了距离和通勤对学校质量（以增值衡量）的适度影响。

30307.title: Stigma in Welfare Programs
30307.authors: Pablo A. Celhay, Bruce D. Meyer, Nikolas Mittag
30307.abstract: Stigma of welfare participation is important for policy and survey design, because it deters program take-up and increases misreporting. Stigma is also relevant to the literature on social image concerns, yet empirical evidence is scant because stigma is difficult to empirically identify. We use a novel approach to studying stigma by examining the relationship between program participation in a recipient’s local network and underreporting program participation in surveys. We find a robust negative relationship and rule out explanations other than stigma. Stigma decreases when more peers engage in the stigmatized behavior and when such actions are less observable.
30307.zh_abstract: 福利参与的污名对政策和调查设计很重要，因为它阻碍了项目参与并增加了误报。污名也与关于社会形象关注的文献相关，然而由于污名难以实证识别，经验证据很少。我们通过考察受助者本地网络中项目参与与调查中项目参与低报之间的关系，采用了一种新颖的方法来研究污名。我们发现了一个稳健的负相关关系，并排除了污名以外的其他解释。当更多同伴从事受污名化的行为且此类行为较不易被观察到时，污名会减少。

30306.title: Social Media and the Behavior of Politicians: Evidence from Facebook in Brazil
30306.zh_title: 社交媒体与政治家行为：来自巴西Facebook的证据
30306.authors: Pedro Bessone, Filipe R. Campante, Claudio Ferraz, Pedro Souza
30306.abstract: We study the relationship between the spread of social media platforms and the communication and responsiveness of politicians towards voters, in the context of the expansion of Facebook in Brazil. We use self-collected data on the universe of Facebook activities by federal legislators and the variation in access induced by the spread of the 3G mobile phone network to establish three sets of findings: (i) Politicians use social media extensively to communicate with constituents, finely targeting localities while addressing policy-relevant topics; (ii) They increase their online engagement, especially with places where they have a large pre-existing vote share; but (iii) They shift their offline engagement (measured by speeches and earmarked transfers) away from connected municipalities within their base of support. Our results suggest that, rather than increasing responsiveness, social media may enable politicians to solidify their position with core supporters using communication strategies, while shifting resources away towards localities that lag in social media presence.
30306.zh_abstract: 我们研究了社交媒体平台的普及与政治家对选民的沟通和回应性之间的关系，背景是Facebook在巴西的扩张。我们利用自行收集的联邦议员Facebook活动全量数据，以及由3G移动电话网络普及所导致的接入差异，建立了三组发现：（i）政治家广泛使用社交媒体与选民沟通，精准定位地方并涉及政策相关话题；（ii）他们增加了在线互动，尤其是在其原有得票率较高的地区；（iii）但他们将线下互动（以演讲和专项拨款衡量）从其支持基础内的联网城市转移出去。我们的结果表明，社交媒体可能并未提高回应性，反而使政治家能够通过沟通策略巩固其核心支持者的地位，同时将资源转移到社交媒体普及滞后的地区。

30305.title: Macroeconomic Forecasting using Filtered Signals from a Stock Market Cross Section
30305.zh_title: 利用股票市场横截面滤波信号进行宏观经济预测
30305.authors: Nicolas Chatelais, Arthur Stalla-Bourdillon, Menzie D. Chinn
30305.abstract: After the Covid-shock in March 2020, stock prices declined abruptly, reflecting both the deterioration of investors’ expectations of economic activity as well as the surge in aggregate risk aversion. In the following months however, whereas economic activity remained sluggish, equity markets sharply bounced back. This disconnect between equity values and macro-variables can be partially explained by other factors, namely the decline in risk-free interest rates, and, for the US, the strong profitability of the IT sector. As a result, an econometrician trying to forecast economic activity with aggregate stock market variables during the Covid-crisis is likely to get poor results. The main idea of the paper is thus to rely on sectorally disaggregated equity variables within a factor model to predict future US economic activity. We find, first, that the factor model better predicts future economic activity compared to aggregate equity variables or to usual benchmarks used in macroeconomic forecasting (both in-sample and out-of-sample). Second, we show that the strong performance of the factor model comes from the fact that the model filters out the “expected returns” component of the sectoral equity variables as well as the foreign component of aggregate future cash flows, and that it also overweights upstream and “value” sectors that are found to be closely linked to the future state of the US business cycle.
30305.zh_abstract: 在2020年3月新冠疫情冲击之后，股票价格急剧下跌，这既反映了投资者对经济活动预期的恶化，也反映了总体风险偏好的飙升。然而，在随后的几个月里，尽管经济活动依然低迷，股票市场却大幅反弹。股票价值与宏观变量之间的这种脱节可以部分由其他因素解释，即无风险利率的下降，以及在美国，IT行业的强劲盈利能力。因此，试图在新冠危机期间利用股票市场总量变量预测经济活动的计量经济学家可能会得到较差的结果。本文的主要思路是，在因子模型中依赖分行业的股票变量来预测未来的美国经济活动。我们首先发现，与股票市场总量变量或宏观经济预测中常用的基准模型（包括样本内和样本外）相比，因子模型能更好地预测未来的经济活动。其次，我们表明，因子模型的强劲表现源于该模型过滤掉了行业股票变量中的“预期收益”成分以及未来总现金流中的外国成分，并且它过度加权了那些被发现与美国未来商业周期状态密切相关的上游和“价值”行业。

30304.title: The Causal Effects of Youth Cigarette Addiction and Education
30304.zh_title: 青少年吸烟成瘾与教育的因果效应
30304.abstract: We develop and estimate a life-cycle model in a rational addiction framework where youth choose to smoke, attend school, work part-time, and consume while facing borrowing constraints. The model features multiple channels for studying the reciprocal causal effects of addiction and education. Variations in endowments and cigarette prices are sources of identification. We show that education causally reduces smoking. A counterfactual experiment finds that in absence of cigarettes, college attendance rises by three percentage points in the population. A practical alternative of 40% additional excise tax achieves similar results. Impacts vary substantially across persons of different cognitive and non-cognitive abilities.
30304.zh_abstract: 我们在理性成瘾框架下开发并估计了一个生命周期模型，在该模型中，青少年在面临借贷约束的情况下选择是否吸烟、上学、兼职工作以及消费。该模型包含多种渠道，用于研究成瘾与教育之间的相互因果效应。禀赋和香烟价格的差异是识别的来源。我们表明，教育因果性地减少了吸烟。一项反事实实验发现，如果没有香烟，大学入学率在人口中会上升三个百分点。一个实际可行的替代方案——额外征收40%的消费税——也能达到类似的效果。影响在不同认知能力和非认知能力的人群中差异很大。
30304.meta: Programs：ED, EH, PE；JEL：H23, I12, I18, I24, I28

30303.title: The Effect of Vaccine Mandates on Disease Spread: Evidence from College COVID-19 Mandates
30303.zh_title: 疫苗强制令对疾病传播的影响：来自大学新冠疫苗强制令的证据
30303.authors: Riley K. Acton, Wenjia Cao, Emily E. Cook, Scott A. Imberman, Michael F. Lovenheim
30303.abstract: Since the spring of 2021, nearly 700 colleges and universities in the U.S. have mandated that their students become vaccinated against the COVID-19 virus. We leverage rich data on colleges’ vaccination policies and semester start dates, along with a variety of county-level public health outcomes, to provide the first estimates of the effects of these mandates on the communities surrounding four-year, residential colleges. In event study specifications, we find that, over the first 13 weeks of the fall 2021 semester, college vaccine mandates reduced new COVID-19 cases by 339 per 100,000 county residents and new deaths by 5.4 per 100,000 residents, with an estimated value of lives saved between $\$9.7$ million and $\$27.4$ million per 100,000 residents. These figures suggest that the mandates reduced total US COVID-19 deaths in autumn 2021 by approximately 5%.
30303.zh_abstract: 自2021年春季以来，美国近700所学院和大学强制要求学生接种新冠疫苗。我们利用关于大学疫苗接种政策和学期开始日期的丰富数据，以及一系列县级公共卫生结果，首次估计了这些强制令对四年制住宿制大学周边社区的影响。在事件研究设定中，我们发现，在2021年秋季学期的前13周内，大学疫苗强制令使每10万县居民中的新增新冠病例减少了339例，每10万居民中的新增死亡减少了5.4例，每10万居民挽救生命的估计价值在970万美元至2740万美元之间。这些数字表明，这些强制令在2021年秋季使美国新冠死亡总数减少了约5%。

30302.title: Long Story Short: Omitted Variable Bias in Causal Machine Learning
30302.zh_title: 长话短说：因果机器学习中的遗漏变量偏误
30302.authors: Victor Chernozhukov, Carlos Cinelli, Whitney Newey, Amit Sharma, Vasilis Syrgkanis
30302.abstract: We derive general, yet simple, sharp bounds on the size of the omitted variable bias for a broad class of causal parameters that can be identified as linear functionals of the conditional expectation function of the outcome. Such functionals encompass many of the traditional targets of investigation in causal inference studies, such as, for example, (weighted) average of potential outcomes, average treatment effects (including subgroup effects, such as the effect on the treated), (weighted) average derivatives, and policy effects from shifts in covariate distribution -- all for general, nonparametric causal models. Our construction relies on the Riesz-Frechet representation of the target functional. Specifically, we show how the bound on the bias depends only on the additional variation that the latent variables create both in the outcome and in the Riesz representer for the parameter of interest. Moreover, in many important cases (e.g, average treatment effects and avearage derivatives) the bound is shown to depend on easily interpretable quantities that measure the explanatory power of the omitted variables. Therefore, simple plausibility judgments on the maximum explanatory power of omitted variables (in explaining treatment and outcome variation) are sufficient to place overall bounds on the size of the bias. Furthermore, we use debiased machine learning to provide flexible and efficient statistical inference on learnable components of the bounds. Finally, empirical examples demonstrate the usefulness of the approach.
30302.zh_abstract: 我们推导出对于一大类可识别为结果条件期望函数的线性泛函的因果参数，其遗漏变量偏误大小的通用、简洁且严格的界限。这些泛函涵盖了因果推断研究中许多传统的研究目标，例如，潜在结果的（加权）平均值、平均处理效应（包括亚组效应，如对受处理者的效应）、（加权）平均导数，以及协变量分布变化带来的政策效应——所有这些都适用于一般的非参数因果模型。我们的构造依赖于目标泛函的Riesz-Fréchet表示。具体来说，我们展示了偏误界限如何仅取决于潜在变量在结果变量和感兴趣参数的Riesz表示子中创造的额外变异。此外，在许多重要情况下（例如，平均处理效应和平均导数），该界限被证明取决于易于解释的量，这些量衡量了遗漏变量的解释力。因此，关于遗漏变量最大解释力（在解释处理和结果变异方面）的简单合理性判断，就足以对偏误大小设置总体界限。此外，我们使用去偏机器学习对界限中可学习的组成部分提供灵活且高效的统计推断。最后，实证例子展示了该方法的实用性。

30301.title: Bringing Them In or Pushing Them Out? The Labor Market Effects of Pro-cyclical Unemployment Assistance Changes
30301.zh_title: 吸引他们进来还是把他们推出去？顺周期失业援助变化的劳动力市场效应
30301.abstract: We exploit an unanticipated labor market reform to estimate the effects of pro-cyclical changes in long-term unemployment assistance (UA). In July 2012, Spain raised the minimum age to receive unlimited-duration UA from 52 to 55. Using a difference-in-differences design, we document that shorter benefits caused (i) shorter non-employment duration, especially among younger workers; (ii) higher labor force exit and other programs' take-up, especially among older workers; (iii) lower wages upon re-employment. The reform induced moderate government savings. Our results highlight the importance of considering the interplay with labor market conditions when designing long-term benefit schedules that affect workers close to retirement.
30301.zh_abstract: 我们利用一次意外的劳动力市场改革来估计长期失业援助顺周期变化的效应。2012年7月，西班牙将领取无限期失业援助的最低年龄从52岁提高到55岁。使用双重差分设计，我们记录了较短的福利期限导致了：（i）非就业持续时间缩短，尤其是在年轻工人中；（ii）劳动力退出和其他项目参与率上升，尤其是在年长工人中；（iii）再就业时工资降低。该改革带来了适度的政府储蓄。我们的结果强调了在设计影响接近退休工人的长期福利计划时，考虑与劳动力市场状况相互作用的重要性。

30300.title: Precautionary Protectionism
30300.abstract: We develop a dynamic extension of Dornbusch et al. (1977) with “rustiness”: the home country has relatively higher unit costs tomorrow for goods it is not producing today. We solve for optimal tariff policy when there is a potential for a crisis: an increase in demand for goods produced abroad. Optimally, the home planner never protects goods where comparative advantage is sufficiently low, not even the goods directly affected by the crises. However, for marginally competitive goods, the optimal policy trades off comparative advantage and demand. The extent of industrial policy is non-monotonic in both the size of the demand shock and in its variance.
30300.zh_abstract: 我们在Dornbusch等人（1977）的基础上发展了一个动态扩展模型，其中包含“生锈”特征：本国今天不生产的商品，其明天的单位成本相对更高。我们在存在危机可能性时求解最优关税政策：危机即对国外生产商品需求的增加。最优情况下，本国规划者从不保护比较优势足够低的商品，即使是那些直接受到危机影响的商品也不保护。然而，对于边际竞争商品，最优政策需要在比较优势和需求之间进行权衡。产业政策的程度在需求冲击的大小及其方差上都是非单调的。

30340.title: Bank Liquid Assets, the Portfolio Motive, and Capital Requirements
30340.zh_title: 银行流动资产、投资组合动机与资本要求
30340.authors: René M. Stulz, Alvaro G. Taboada, Mathijs A. van Dijk
30340.abstract: Banks hold large amounts of liquid assets. These amounts grow sharply for the largest banks after the global financial crisis (GFC). The standard transaction and precautionary motives for holding liquid assets cannot explain the size and evolution of bank liquid asset holdings. Motivated by the deposit view of banks, we introduce a portfolio motive such that banks hold more liquid assets when they have poorer lending opportunities, making loans and liquid assets substitutes. We find support for the portfolio motive and for its prediction that capital requirement increases help explain the post-GFC growth in the largest banks’ liquid asset holdings.
30340.zh_abstract: 银行持有大量流动资产。全球金融危机后，最大银行的这些资产规模急剧增长。持有流动资产的常规交易动机和预防性动机无法解释银行流动资产持有量的规模和演变。受银行存款观点的启发，我们引入了一个投资组合动机，即当银行的贷款机会较差时，它们会持有更多流动资产，使贷款和流动资产成为替代品。我们找到了支持投资组合动机的证据，也支持其预测，即资本要求的提高有助于解释全球金融危机后最大银行流动资产持有量的增长。

30339.title: The Benefits and Costs of U.S. Employer COVID-19 Vaccine Mandates
30339.zh_title: 美国雇主COVID-19疫苗强制令的收益与成本
30339.authors: Maddalena Ferranna, Lisa A. Robinson, Daniel Cadarette, Michael Eber, David E. Bloom
30339.abstract: In 2021, the Biden Administration issued mandates requiring COVID-19 vaccinations for U.S. federal employees and contractors and for some healthcare and private sector workers. Although these mandates have been subject to legal challenges and some have been halted or delayed, rigorous appraisal of their benefits and costs accompanied neither the decision to implement them nor the efforts to terminate them. This paper aims to help fill that gap. We estimate the direct costs and health-related benefits that would have accrued if these vaccination requirements had been implemented as intended. Compared with the vaccination rates observed in January 2022, we find that the mandates could have led to 15 million additional vaccinated individuals, increasing the overall proportion of the fully vaccinated U.S. population to 68%. The associated net benefits depend on the evolution of the pandemic from the time of mandate enactment—information unavailable ex ante to analysts or policymakers. In scenarios involving the emergence of a novel, more transmissible variant, against which vaccination and previous infection offer moderate protection, the estimated net benefits reach more than $\$16,000$ per additional vaccinated individual, with more than 20,000 total deaths averted in total. In scenarios involving a fading pandemic, existing vaccination-acquired or infection-acquired immunity provides sufficient protection, and the mandates’ benefits are unlikely to exceed their costs. Thus, mandates may be most useful when the consequences of inaction are catastrophic. However, we do not compare the effects of mandates with alternative policies for increasing vaccination rates or promoting other protective measures, which may receive stronger public support and be less likely to be overturned by litigation.
30339.zh_abstract: 2021年，拜登政府发布强制令，要求美国联邦雇员和承包商以及部分医疗保健和私营部门工人接种COVID-19疫苗。尽管这些强制令面临法律挑战，其中一些已被暂停或推迟，但在实施或终止这些强制令时，并未伴随对其收益和成本的严格评估。本文旨在帮助填补这一空白。我们估算了如果这些疫苗接种要求按计划实施本应产生的直接成本和健康相关收益。与2022年1月观察到的疫苗接种率相比，我们发现这些强制令本可使额外1500万人接种疫苗，将美国完全接种疫苗人口的整体比例提高到68%。相关的净收益取决于强制令颁布时大流行的演变——分析师或政策制定者事先无法获得这些信息。在出现一种新的、传染性更强的变种，且疫苗接种和既往感染提供中等保护的情景下，估计的净收益达到每位额外接种者超过16,000美元，总共避免超过20,000人死亡。在大流行消退的情景下，现有的疫苗获得性或感染获得性免疫提供了足够保护，强制令的收益不太可能超过其成本。因此，当不作为的后果是灾难性时，强制令可能最为有用。然而，我们并未将强制令的效果与提高疫苗接种率或推广其他保护措施的替代政策进行比较，这些替代政策可能获得更强的公众支持，且不太可能因诉讼而被推翻。

30338.title: Climate Change Around the World
30338.authors: Per Krusell, Anthony A. Smith Jr.
30338.abstract: The economic effects of climate change vary across both time and space. To study these effects, this paper builds a global economy-climate model featuring a high degree of geographic resolution. Carbon emissions from the use of energy in production increase the Earth's (average) temperature and local, or regional, temperatures respond more or less sensitively to this increase. Each of the approximately 19,000 regions makes optimal consumption-savings and energy-use decisions as its climate (or regional temperature) and, consequently, its productivity change over time. The relationship between regional temperature and regional productivity has an inverted U-shape, calibrated so that the high-resolution model replicates estimates of aggregate global damages from global warming. At the global level, then, the high-resolution model nests standard one-region economy-climate models, while at the same time it features realistic spatial variation in climate and economic activity. The central result is that the effects of climate change vary dramatically across space---with many regions gaining while others lose---and the global average effects, while negative, are dwarfed quantitatively by the differences across space. A tax on carbon increases average (global) welfare, but there is a large disparity of views on it across regions, with both winners and losers. Climate change also leads to large increases in global inequality, across both regions and countries. These findings vary little as capital markets range from closed (autarky) to open (free capital mobility).
30338.zh_abstract: 气候变化的经济效应在时间和空间上均存在差异。为研究这些效应，本文构建了一个具有高地理分辨率的全球经济-气候模型。生产中能源使用产生的碳排放会提高地球（平均）温度，而局部或区域温度对此升高的敏感程度各不相同。随着气候（或区域温度）及其生产率随时间变化，约19,000个区域中的每一个都会做出最优的消费-储蓄和能源使用决策。区域温度与区域生产率之间的关系呈倒U形，经过校准后，该高分辨率模型能够复制全球变暖对全球总体损害的估计值。因此，在全球层面上，高分辨率模型嵌套了标准的单区域经济-气候模型，同时体现了气候和经济活动在空间上的现实异质性。核心结果是，气候变化的影响在空间上差异巨大——许多地区受益而其他地区受损——全球平均效应虽为负值，但在数量上远小于空间差异。征收碳税会提高平均（全球）福利，但各地区对此存在巨大分歧，既有受益者也有受损者。气候变化还导致全球不平等程度大幅上升，无论是在区域之间还是国家之间。这些发现几乎不因资本市场从封闭（自给自足）到开放（资本自由流动）的状态变化而改变。

30337.title: The Macroeconomic Consequences of Natural Rate Shocks: An Empirical Investigation
30337.zh_title: 自然利率冲击的宏观经济后果：一项实证研究
30337.abstract: Much of the empirical literature on the natural rate of interest has focused on estimating its path. This paper studies the effects of natural rate shocks on output and inflation. It estimates a semi-structural model inspired by the DSGE literature. A decline in the natural rate is found to have a large negative effect on the trend of output and to be contractionary and deflationary in the short run. When the economy is constrained by the zero lower bound (ZLB), these results are consistent with the secular stagnation hypothesis. However, negative natural rate shocks are found to depress the trend of output even outside of the ZLB, calling for a more general theory of secular stagnation.
30337.zh_abstract: 关于自然利率的实证文献大多侧重于估计其路径。本文研究自然利率冲击对产出和通胀的影响。它估计了一个受DSGE文献启发的半结构模型。研究发现，自然利率下降对产出趋势有较大的负向影响，并在短期内具有收缩性和通缩性。当经济受到零下限约束时，这些结果与长期停滞假说一致。然而，即使在零下限之外，负向自然利率冲击也会抑制产出趋势，这需要一种更一般的长期停滞理论来解释。

30336.title: Internationalizing Like China
30336.authors: Christopher Clayton, Amanda Dos Santos, Matteo Maggiori, Jesse Schreger
30336.abstract: We empirically characterize how China is internationalizing its bond market by staggering the entry of different types of foreign investors into its domestic market and propose a dynamic reputation model to explain this strategy. Our framework rationalizes China’s strategy as trying to build credibility as a safe issuer while reducing the cost of capital flight. We use our framework to shed light on China’s response to episodes of capital outflows.
30336.zh_abstract: 我们通过实证刻画了中国如何通过分阶段允许不同类型的外国投资者进入其国内市场来实现债券市场国际化，并提出了一个动态声誉模型来解释这一策略。我们的框架将中国的策略合理化，认为其旨在建立作为安全发行者的可信度，同时降低资本外逃的成本。我们利用该框架来阐明中国对资本外流事件的应对措施。
30336.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ITI, ME, POL；JEL：E0, F2, F3

30335.title: Lessons from U.S.-China Trade Relations
30335.abstract: We review theoretical and empirical work on the economic effects of the United States and China trade relations during the last decades. We first discuss the origins of the China shock, its measurement, and present methods used to study its economic effects on different outcomes. We then focus on the recent U.S.-China trade war. We discuss methods used to evaluate its effects, describe its economic effects, and analyze if this increase in trade protectionism reverted the effects of the China shock. The main lessons learned in this review are: (i) the aggregate gains from U.S.-China trade created winners and losers; (ii) China's trade expansion seems not to be the main cause of the decline in U.S. manufacturing employment during the same period; and (iii) the recent trade war generated welfare losses, had small employment effects, and was ineffective in reversing the distributional effects due to the China shock.
30335.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了过去几十年关于美中贸易关系经济效应的理论和实证研究。我们首先讨论了中国冲击的起源、其衡量方法，以及用于研究其对不同结果经济效应的现有方法。然后，我们聚焦于近期的美中贸易战。我们讨论了评估其影响的方法，描述了其经济效应，并分析了这种贸易保护主义的加剧是否逆转了中国冲击的影响。本综述的主要教训是：(i) 美中贸易带来的总体收益创造了赢家和输家；(ii) 中国贸易扩张似乎并非同期美国制造业就业下降的主要原因；(iii) 近期的贸易战造成了福利损失，对就业影响甚微，并且未能有效逆转中国冲击带来的分配效应。
30335.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：F1, F10, F11, F12, F13, F14, F15, F16, F19

30334.title: Superiority-Seeking and the Preference for Exclusion
30334.zh_title: 优越感追求与排斥偏好
30334.abstract: We propose that a person’s desire to consume an object or possess an attribute increases in how much others want but cannot have it. We term this motive superiority-seeking, and show that it generates preferences for exclusion that help explain a host of market anomalies and make novel predictions in a variety of domains. In bilateral exchange, there is a reluctance to trade and people exhibit a ‘social endowment effect.’ People’s value of consuming a good increases in its scarcity, which generates a motive for firms and organizations to cater to such preferences by engaging in exclusionary policies. Randomly barring potential consumers from the opportunity to acquire a product increases the seller’s profits both in standard monopoly and auction settings. Such non-price-based exclusion leads to higher revenues than the classic optimal sales mechanisms. A series of experiments provides direct support for these predictions. In basic exchange, a person’s willingness to pay for a good increases as more people are explicitly barred from the opportunity to acquire it. In auctions, randomly excluding people from the opportunity to bid substantially increases bids amongst those who retain this option. Exclusion leads to bigger gains in expected revenue than increasing competition through inclusion. Our model of superiority-seeking generates ‘Veblen effects,’ rationalizes attitudes against redistribution, and provides a novel motive for social stratification and discrimination.
30334.zh_abstract: 我们提出，一个人消费某物或拥有某种属性的欲望，会随着其他人想要但无法拥有该物的程度而增加。我们将这种动机称为优越感追求，并表明它会产生排斥偏好，这有助于解释一系列市场异象，并在多个领域做出新颖的预测。在双边交换中，存在交易惰性，人们表现出一种“社会禀赋效应”。人们对消费某物的价值会因其稀缺性而增加，这为企业或组织通过实施排斥性政策来迎合此类偏好提供了动机。随机阻止潜在消费者获得产品的机会，无论是在标准垄断还是拍卖环境中，都能提高卖方的利润。这种非价格排斥机制比经典的最优销售机制带来更高的收入。一系列实验为这些预测提供了直接支持。在基本交换中，随着更多人被明确禁止获得某物的机会，一个人对该物的支付意愿会增加。在拍卖中，随机排除人们出价的机会，会显著提高那些保留出价机会者的出价。排斥带来的预期收入增长大于通过包容来增加竞争。我们的优越感追求模型产生了“凡勃伦效应”，使反对再分配的态度合理化，并为社会分层和歧视提供了新的动机。
30334.meta: Programs：LS, POL；JEL：D01, D02, D03, D45, D9, D91

30333.title: Noisy Foresight
30333.abstract: Rational agents must perform backwards induction by thinking contingently about future states and actions, but failures of backwards induction and contingent reasoning are ubiquitous. How do boundedly-rational agents make decisions when they fail to correctly forecast actions in the future? We construct an individual decision-making experiment to collect a rich dataset in which subjects must reason only about their own future actions. We demonstrate substantial mistakes relative to the rational benchmark, and use the rich dataset to estimate several possible models of boundedly-rational foresight. We find that a model in which subjects expect to make more mistakes when the payoff consequences of their future actions are more similar best explains behavior.
30333.zh_abstract: 理性主体必须通过条件性地思考未来状态和行动来进行逆向归纳，但逆向归纳和条件性推理的失败普遍存在。当有限理性主体无法正确预测未来的行动时，他们如何做出决策？我们构建了一个个体决策实验，收集了一个丰富的数据集，其中受试者只需推理自己未来的行动。我们证明了相对于理性基准存在大量错误，并利用该丰富数据集估计了几种可能的有限理性预见模型。我们发现，一个假设受试者预期在未来行动的收益后果更相似时会犯更多错误的模型，最能解释其行为。

30332.title: Green Energy Jobs in the US: What Are They, and Where Are They?
30332.zh_title: 美国的绿色能源就业：它们是什么，在哪里？
30332.abstract: Does the growth of renewable energy benefit US workers, and which workers stand to benefit the most? Until now, evidence on green energy jobs has been limited due to measurement issues. We use data on nearly all jobs posted online in the US, as collected by Burning Glass Technology, and we create a new measure of green jobs, defined here as solar and wind jobs. We use job titles and task requirements to define green jobs. We find that both solar and wind job postings have more than tripled since 2010, with solar jobs seeing especially strong growth that precedes the growth of new installed solar capacity. In 2019, we identify approximately 52,500 solar job openings and 13,500 wind job openings. Solar jobs are mostly (33%) in sales occupations, and in the utilities industry (16%). Wind jobs are most represented among installation and maintenance occupations (37%), and in the manufacturing industry (29%). Green jobs are created in occupations that are about 21% higher paying than average. The pay premium is even higher for jobs with a low educational requirement. Finally, green jobs tend to locate in counties with high shares of employment in fossil fuel extraction. Overall, our results suggest that the growth of renewable energy leads to the creation of relatively high paying jobs, which are more often than not located in areas that stand to lose from a decline in fossil fuel extraction jobs.
30332.zh_abstract: 可再生能源的增长是否有利于美国工人，哪些工人将受益最大？迄今为止，由于衡量问题，关于绿色能源就业的证据有限。我们使用Burning Glass Technology收集的美国几乎所有在线招聘职位的数据，并创建了一个新的绿色就业衡量指标，此处定义为太阳能和风能就业。我们使用职位名称和任务要求来定义绿色就业。我们发现，自2010年以来，太阳能和风能职位的招聘信息都增加了两倍以上，其中太阳能就业的增长尤为强劲，且先于新增太阳能装机容量的增长。2019年，我们识别出大约52,500个太阳能职位空缺和13,500个风能职位空缺。太阳能职位主要集中在销售职业（33%）和公用事业行业（16%）。风能职位在安装与维护职业（37%）和制造业（29%）中占比最高。绿色就业所在的职业平均薪酬比平均水平高出约21%。对于教育要求较低的职位，薪酬溢价甚至更高。最后，绿色就业往往位于化石燃料开采就业份额高的县。总体而言，我们的结果表明，可再生能源的增长导致了相对高薪就业岗位的创造，而这些岗位往往位于可能因化石燃料开采岗位减少而受损的地区。

30331.title: The Returns to College Major Choice: Average and Distributional Effects, Career Trajectories, and Earnings Variability
30331.zh_title: 大学专业选择的回报：平均与分布效应、职业轨迹及收入波动性
30331.authors: Rodney J. Andrews, Scott A. Imberman, Michael F. Lovenheim, Kevin M. Stange
30331.abstract: Motivated by the large returns to skill in the labor market, there is a growing body of research examining labor market returns to college major. Prior research focuses almost exclusively on mean effects and pays little attention to earnings growth and variability. Using data from Texas on public K-12 students followed through college and into the labor market, we find that the focus on mean differences mask important features of the returns to college majors. First, earnings growth varies with major choice, making returns sensitive to the experience distribution of the sample. Second, quantile treatment effect estimates show considerable cross sectional differences in earnings returns. Third, major choice affects earnings variability within workers over time. We use our results to simulate a lifecycle utility model and compare mid-career utility and mean earnings returns across fields while highlighting the important role of risk preferences. For four-year students, utility returns align with earnings returns, and utility returns increase as students become more risk averse. Results for two-year students are broadly similar, though risk preferences interact with cross-sectional earnings returns variation in complex ways that highlight the importance of different dimensions of risk in driving the returns to major choice.
30331.zh_abstract: 受劳动力市场中技能回报巨大的启发，越来越多的研究考察大学专业的劳动力市场回报。以往的研究几乎只关注平均效应，很少关注收入增长和波动性。利用德克萨斯州公立K-12学生从大学到劳动力市场的追踪数据，我们发现对平均差异的关注掩盖了大学专业回报的重要特征。首先，收入增长随专业选择而变化，使得回报对样本的经验分布敏感。其次，分位数处理效应估计显示收入回报存在显著的横截面差异。第三，专业选择会影响工人个体随时间推移的收入波动性。我们利用研究结果模拟了一个生命周期效用模型，并比较了不同领域的职业生涯中期效用和平均收入回报，同时强调了风险偏好的重要作用。对于四年制学生，效用回报与收入回报一致，并且随着学生风险厌恶程度的增加，效用回报也会增加。两年制学生的结果大致相似，尽管风险偏好与横截面收入回报变异以复杂的方式相互作用，这凸显了不同风险维度在驱动专业选择回报中的重要性。

30329.title: Unconventional Monetary Policy According to HANK
30329.zh_title: 基于HANK模型的非常规货币政策
30329.authors: Eric R. Sims, Jing Cynthia Wu, Ji Zhang
30329.abstract: This paper studies the implications of household heterogeneity for the effectiveness of quantitative easing (QE). We consider a heterogeneous agent New Keynesian (HANK) model with uninsurable household income risk. Financial intermediaries are subject to an endogenous leverage constraint that allows QE to matter. We find that macro aggregates react very similarly to a QE shock in the HANK model compared to a representative agent (RANK) version of the model. This finding is robust across different micro- and macro- distributions of wealth.
30329.zh_abstract: 本文研究了家庭异质性对量化宽松（QE）有效性的影响。我们构建了一个包含不可保险家庭收入风险的异质性代理人新凯恩斯（HANK）模型。金融中介面临内生的杠杆约束，这使得量化宽松能够发挥作用。我们发现，与代表性代理人（RANK）版本的模型相比，在HANK模型中，宏观总量对量化宽松冲击的反应非常相似。这一发现在不同的微观和宏观财富分布下都是稳健的。

30328.title: Fiscal Histories
30328.abstract: The fiscal theory states that inflation adjusts so that the real value of government debt equals the present value of real primary surpluses. Monetary policy remains important. The central bank can set an interest rate target, which determines the path of expected inflation, while news about the present value of surpluses drives unexpected inflation. I use fiscal theory to interpret historical episodes, including the rise and fall of inflation in the 1970s and 1980s, the long quiet zero bound of the 2010s, and the reemergence of inflation in 2021, as well as to analyze the gold standard, currency pegs, the ends of hyperinflations, currency crashes, and the success of inflation targets. Going forward, fiscal theory warns that inflation will have to be tamed by coordinated monetary and fiscal policy. I thank Erik Hurst, Ed Nelson, Nina Pavcnik, and Timothy Taylor for helpful comments.
30328.zh_abstract: 财政理论指出，通货膨胀会进行调整，以使政府债务的实际价值等于实际基本盈余的现值。货币政策仍然重要。央行可以设定利率目标，这决定了预期通胀的路径，而关于盈余现值的信息则驱动了意外的通胀。我运用财政理论来解释历史事件，包括20世纪70年代和80年代通胀的上升和下降、2010年代长期平静的零利率下限、以及2021年通胀的重新出现，并分析金本位制、货币挂钩、恶性通胀的终结、货币崩溃以及通胀目标制的成功。展望未来，财政理论警告说，通胀必须通过协调的货币和财政政策来加以控制。我感谢Erik Hurst、Ed Nelson、Nina Pavcnik和Timothy Taylor提出的有益评论。
30328.meta: Programs：AP, EFG；JEL：E42, E52, E58, E61, E62, E63, E65

30327.title: Independent Contracting, Self-Employment, and Gig Work: Evidence from California Tax Data
30327.zh_title: 独立承包、自雇与零工经济：来自加州税收数据的证据
30327.authors: Annette Bernhardt, Christopher Campos, Allen Prohofsky, Aparna Ramesh, Jesse Rothstein
30327.abstract: We use de-identified data from California personal income tax returns to measure the frequency and nature of independent contracting and self-employment work in California. We identify this work by the presence of a Schedule C on the tax return and/or the receipt of a Form 1099 information return. We estimate that 14.4% of California workers aged 18-64 in tax year 2016 had some independent contracting or self-employment income; about half of these workers also had earnings from traditional W-2 jobs during the year. We find that only a small share (1.4%) of workers had earnings from online labor platforms (often called gig work). Workers with low earnings were significantly more likely to earn independent contracting or self-employment income and to rely primarily or exclusively on that income. We explore the characteristics of workers engaging in independent contracting and self-employment and their distribution across family type, geography, and industry.
30327.zh_abstract: 我们使用来自加州个人所得税申报表的去标识化数据，来衡量加州独立承包和自雇工作的频率和性质。我们通过纳税申报表中是否存在附表C和/或是否收到1099信息申报表来识别这类工作。我们估计，在2016纳税年度，18-64岁的加州工人中有14.4%拥有一些独立承包或自雇收入；其中约一半的工人当年还拥有来自传统W-2工作的收入。我们发现，只有一小部分工人（1.4%）拥有来自在线劳动平台（通常称为零工工作）的收入。收入较低的工人更有可能获得独立承包或自雇收入，并且更主要或完全依赖该收入。我们探讨了从事独立承包和自雇工作的工人的特征，以及他们在家庭类型、地理位置和行业中的分布。

30326.title: The Political Economy of the Decline of Antitrust Enforcement in the United States
30326.zh_title: 美国反垄断执法衰落的政治经济学
30326.authors: Filippo Lancieri, Eric A. Posner, Luigi Zingales
30326.abstract: Antitrust enforcement in the United States has declined since the 1960s. Building on several new datasets, we argue that this decline did not reflect a popular demand for weaker enforcement or any other kind of democratic sanction. The decline was engineered by unelected regulators and judges who, with a few exceptions, did not express skepticism about antitrust law in confirmation hearings. We find little evidence that academic ideas played an important role in the decline of antitrust enforcement except where they coincided with the interests of big business, which appears to have exercised influence behind the scenes.
30326.zh_abstract: 自20世纪60年代以来，美国的反垄断执法有所减弱。基于几个新的数据集，我们认为这种衰落并未反映公众对弱化执法的需求或任何其他形式的民主认可。这种衰落是由未经选举的监管者和法官策划的，除了少数例外，他们在确认听证会上并未表达对反垄断法的怀疑。我们发现，几乎没有证据表明学术思想在反垄断执法的衰落中发挥了重要作用，除非这些思想与大企业的利益相吻合，而大企业似乎在幕后施加了影响。

30325.title: Quality Regulation and Competition: Evidence from Pharmaceutical Markets
30325.zh_title: 质量监管与竞争：来自药品市场的证据
30325.authors: Juan Pablo Atal, José Ignacio Cuesta, Morten Sæthre
30325.abstract: Quality regulation attempts to ensure quality and foster competition by reducing vertical differentiation, but it may also have adverse effects on market structure. We study this trade-off in the context of pharmaceutical bioequivalence, which is the primary quality standard for generic drugs. Exploiting the introduction of bioequivalence in Chile, we find that stronger regulation decreased the number of drugs in the market by 21 percent and increased average paid prices by 13 percent. We estimate a model of drug entry, certification, and demand to study the role of drug quality, aversion to generics, and certification costs in shaping the equilibrium effects of quality regulation. We find that quality regulation increased demand for generic drugs by resolving asymmetric information and reducing aversion against unbranded generics, which induced entry of high-quality drugs in place of low-quality drugs. Consumer welfare increased despite higher prices and a lower number of firms. We compare minimum quality standards to quality disclosure and other designs of quality regulation.
30325.zh_abstract: 质量监管试图通过减少纵向差异化来确保质量并促进竞争，但它也可能对市场结构产生不利影响。我们在药品生物等效性（仿制药的主要质量标准）的背景下研究这种权衡。利用智利引入生物等效性要求的情况，我们发现更严格的监管使市场上的药品数量减少了21%，并使平均支付价格提高了13%。我们估计了一个关于药品进入、认证和需求的模型，以研究药品质量、对仿制药的厌恶以及认证成本在塑造质量监管均衡效应中的作用。我们发现，质量监管通过解决信息不对称和减少对非品牌仿制药的厌恶，增加了对仿制药的需求，这促使高质量药品进入市场以取代低质量药品。尽管价格更高且企业数量更少，但消费者福利增加了。我们将最低质量标准与质量披露及其他质量监管设计进行了比较。

30324.title: China's Financial System and Economy: A Review
30324.zh_title: 中国的金融体系与经济：一个综述
30324.abstract: China's financial system has been integral to its spectacular economic growth over the past 40 years. We review the recent literature on China's financial system and its connections to the Chinese economy based on the categories of Aggregate Financing to the Real Economy (AFRE), a broad measure of the nation's yearly flow of liquidity accounting for unique features of China's financial system. While early work on China's financial system emphasizes the state-owned enterprise (SOE) reform, the recent literature explores other more market-based financing channels—including shadow banking—that grew rapidly after 2010 and have become important components of AFRE. These new financing channels are not only intertwined with each other, but more importantly often ultimately tied back to the dominant banking sector in China. Understanding the mechanisms behind these channels and their intrinsic connections is crucial to alleviate capital allocation distortion and mitigate potential systemic financial risk in China.
30324.zh_abstract: 中国的金融体系对其过去40年惊人的经济增长至关重要。我们基于社会融资规模（AFRE）这一衡量全国年度流动性流动的广义指标，回顾了近期关于中国金融体系及其与中国经济联系的文献，该指标考虑了中国金融体系的独特特征。虽然早期关于中国金融体系的研究强调国有企业改革，但近期文献探讨了其他更市场化的融资渠道——包括影子银行——这些渠道在2010年后快速增长，并已成为社会融资规模的重要组成部分。这些新的融资渠道不仅相互交织，而且更重要的是，它们往往最终与占主导地位的中国银行业部门相关联。理解这些渠道背后的机制及其内在联系，对于缓解资本配置扭曲和降低中国潜在的系统性金融风险至关重要。
30324.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, POL；JEL：G10, G20, G30, O16, O17, O33, P34

30323.title: When the Kids Grow Up: Women's Employment and Earnings across the Family Cycle
30323.zh_title: 当孩子长大：女性在家庭周期中的就业与收入
30323.authors: Claudia Goldin, Sari Pekkala Kerr, Claudia Olivetti
30323.abstract: Women earn less than men, and that is especially true of mothers relative to fathers. Much of the widening occurs after family formation when mothers reduce their hours of work. But what happens when the kids grow up? To answer that question, we estimate three earning gaps: the “motherhood penalty,” the “price of being female,” and the “fatherhood premium.” When added together these three produce the “parental gender gap,” defined as the difference in income between mothers and fathers. We estimate earnings gaps for two education groups (college graduates and high school graduates who did not complete college) using longitudinal data from the NLSY79 that tracks respondents from their twenties to their fifties. As the children grow up and as women work more hours, the motherhood penalty is greatly reduced, especially for the less-educated group. But fathers manage to expand their relative gains, particularly among college graduates. The parental gender gap in earnings remains substantial for both education groups.
30323.zh_abstract: 女性收入低于男性，母亲相对于父亲尤其如此。这种差距的扩大主要发生在家庭形成之后，此时母亲会减少工作时间。但当孩子长大后会发生什么？为了回答这个问题，我们估计了三个收入差距：“母亲惩罚”、“作为女性的代价”和“父亲溢价”。这三者加总产生了“父母性别差距”，定义为母亲和父亲之间的收入差异。我们使用NLSY79的纵向数据，对两个教育群体（大学毕业生和未完成大学的高中毕业生）估计了收入差距，该数据追踪了受访者从二十多岁到五十多岁的情况。随着孩子长大以及女性工作时间增加，母亲惩罚大大减少，尤其是在受教育程度较低的群体中。但父亲们设法扩大了他们的相对收益，尤其是在大学毕业生中。对于两个教育群体而言，父母之间的收入性别差距仍然很大。

30322.title: The Wage Curve After the Great Recession
30322.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson, Jackson Spurling
30322.abstract: Most economists maintain that the labor market in the United States is ‘tight’ because unemployment rates are low. They infer from this that there is potential for wage-push inflation. However, real wages are falling rapidly at present and, prior to that, real wages had been stagnant for some time. We show that unemployment is not key to understanding wage formation in the USA and hasn’t been since the Great Recession. Instead, we show rates of under-employment (the percentage of workers with part-time hours who would prefer more hours) and the rate of non-employment which includes both the unemployed and those out of the labor force who are not working significantly reduce wage pressures in the United States. This finding holds in panel data with state and year fixed effects and is supportive of a wage curve which fits the data much better than a Phillips Curve. We find no role for vacancies; the V:U ratio is negatively not positively associated with wage growth since 2020. The implication is that the reserve army of labor which acts as a brake on wage growth extends beyond the unemployed and operates from within and outside the firm.
30322.zh_abstract: 大多数经济学家认为，由于失业率较低，美国的劳动力市场是“紧张的”。他们由此推断存在工资推动型通胀的潜力。然而，目前实际工资正在迅速下降，而在此之前，实际工资已经停滞了一段时间。我们表明，失业率并不是理解美国工资形成的关键，而且自大衰退以来一直如此。相反，我们表明，就业不足率（希望工作更长时间但从事兼职工作的工人比例）和非就业率（包括失业者和不在劳动力队伍中且未工作的人）显著降低了美国的工资压力。这一发现在包含州和年份固定效应的面板数据中成立，并支持了工资曲线，该曲线比菲利普斯曲线更好地拟合数据。我们发现职位空缺没有作用；自2020年以来，V:U比率与工资增长呈负相关而非正相关。这意味着，作为工资增长制动器的劳动力后备军，其范围超出了失业者，并在企业内部和外部运作。
30322.meta: Programs：IFM, LS, ME；JEL：E24, J20, J30, J60

30321.title: Taxing Externalities: Revenue vs. Welfare Gains with an Application to U.S. Carbon Taxes
30321.zh_title: 对负外部性征税：收入与福利收益——以美国碳税为例
30321.abstract: This paper asserts that reporting of the ratio of welfare gains to tax revenue should be standard protocol in economic analyses of externality correcting taxes. That this comparison might matter is somewhat of a “blind spot” in most economic analyses, for it plays virtually no role when economists recommend taxes to internalize externalities. A simple model illustrates how the ratio of welfare gains to tax revenue plays a central role in a political economy and efficiency framing of Pigouvian type taxes. The analysis also shows intuitive results about how the ratio is increasing in the marginal external costs and the equilibrium elasticity to a tax. The second part of the paper illustrates the wide range of potential results with application of carbon taxes to different fuels in the United States. For example, assuming a social cost of carbon (SCC) and a carbon tax equal to $\$50$ per tonne, the central estimates imply ratios of 12.1 for coal, 0.36 for natural gas, and very close to zero for diesel and gasoline. When all four fuels are combined, the ratios indicate a more proportional balance between welfare gains and tax revenue, with overall estimates ranging between 0.7 and 2.8. The paper concludes with a general appeal for economists to pay more attention to the relative magnitudes of efficiency gains and tax revenue when analyzing and advocating for externality correcting taxes.
30321.zh_abstract: 本文主张，在外部性矫正税收的经济分析中，应将福利收益与税收收入之比作为标准报告指标。这一比较在大多数经济分析中几乎是一个“盲点”，因为经济学家在推荐通过征税来内部化外部性时，几乎从未考虑这一比率。一个简单模型展示了福利收益与税收收入之比如何在庇古税的政治经济学和效率框架中发挥核心作用。分析还表明，该比率随边际外部成本和税收均衡弹性的增加而上升的直观结果。论文第二部分以美国不同燃料的碳税应用为例，展示了潜在结果的广泛范围。例如，假设社会碳成本（SCC）和碳税均为每吨50美元，中心估计值显示煤炭的比率为12.1，天然气为0.36，柴油和汽油则非常接近零。当四种燃料合并时，该比率表明福利收益与税收收入之间更为均衡，总体估计值在0.7至2.8之间。论文最后呼吁经济学家在分析和倡导外部性矫正税时，应更加关注效率收益与税收收入的相对规模。
30321.meta: Programs：EEE, PE；JEL：H2, H21, H23, Q38, Q4

30320.title: Do Funding Agencies Select and Enable Risky Research: Evidence from ERC Using Novelty as a Proxy of Risk Taking
30320.zh_title: 资助机构是否选择并支持高风险研究：以新颖性作为风险承担代理变量的欧洲研究理事会证据
30320.authors: Reinhilde Veugelers, Jian Wang, Paula Stephan
30320.abstract: Concern exists that public funding of science is increasingly risk averse. Funders have addressed this concern by soliciting the submission of high-risk research to either regular or specially designed programs. Little evidence, however, has been gathered to examine the extent to which such programs and initiatives accomplish their stated goal. This paper sets out to study this using data from the European Research Council (ERC), a program within the EC, established in 2007 to support high-risk/high-gain research. We examine whether the ERC selected researchers with a track record of conducting risky research. We proxy high-risk by a measure of novelty in the publication records of applicants both before and after the application, recognizing that it is but one dimension of risk. We control and interact the risk measure with high-gain by tracking whether the applicant has one or more top 1% highly cited papers in their field. We find that applicants with a history of risky research are less likely to be selected for funding than those without such a history, especially early career applicants. This selection penalty for high-risk also holds among those applicants with a history of high-gain publications. To test whether receiving a long and generous prestigious ERC grant promotes risk taking, we employ a diff-in-diff approach. We find no evidence of a significant positive risk treatment effect for advanced grantees. Only for early career grantees do we find that recipients are more likely to engage in risky research, but only compared to applicants who are unsuccessful at the second stage. This positive treatment effect is in part due to unsuccessful applicants cutting back on risky research. We cautiously interpret this as a “lesson learned” that risk is not rewarded.
30320.zh_abstract: 人们担忧公共科学资助日益规避风险。资助者通过征集高风险研究提交至常规或专门设计的项目来应对这一担忧。然而，很少有证据检验这些项目和举措在多大程度上实现了其既定目标。本文利用欧洲研究理事会（ERC）的数据进行研究，ERC是欧盟委员会于2007年设立的一个项目，旨在支持高风险/高回报研究。我们考察ERC是否选择了有从事高风险研究记录的申请者。我们以申请者申请前后发表记录中的新颖性度量作为高风险的代理变量，同时认识到这只是风险的一个维度。我们通过追踪申请者是否在其领域内拥有一篇或多篇前1%高被引论文，来控制风险度量并与高回报进行交互分析。我们发现，有高风险研究历史的申请者比没有此类历史的申请者更不可能获得资助，尤其是早期职业申请者。这种对高风险的选拔惩罚同样存在于有高回报发表历史的申请者中。为了检验获得长期且慷慨的著名ERC资助是否促进风险承担，我们采用了双重差分方法。我们没有发现对高级受资助者存在显著正向风险处理效应的证据。仅在早期职业受资助者中，我们发现受资助者更可能从事高风险研究，但这仅与在第二阶段未成功的申请者相比。这种正向处理效应部分源于未成功申请者减少了高风险研究。我们谨慎地将此解释为“经验教训”，即风险并未得到回报。

30319.title: Origins of International Factor Structures
30319.abstract: We show that exchange rate correlations tend to be explained by the global trade network while consumption correlations tend to be explained by productivity correlations. Sharing common trade linkages with other countries increases exchange rate correlations beyond bilateral linkages. We explain these findings using a model of the global trade network with market segmentation. Interdependent global production generates international comovements, while market segmentation disconnects the drivers of exchange rate correlations from the drivers of consumption correlations. Moreover, we show that the trade network generates common factors found in exchange rates. Our findings offer a trade-based account of the origins of international comovements and shed light on important frictions in international markets.
30319.zh_abstract: 我们表明，汇率相关性往往由全球贸易网络解释，而消费相关性往往由生产率相关性解释。与其他国家共享共同贸易联系会增加汇率相关性，其影响超出双边联系。我们利用一个具有市场分割的全球贸易网络模型来解释这些发现。相互依赖的全球生产产生了国际联动，而市场分割则使汇率相关性的驱动因素与消费相关性的驱动因素脱钩。此外，我们表明贸易网络产生了汇率中发现的共同因子。我们的发现为国际联动的起源提供了基于贸易的解释，并揭示了国际市场中的重要摩擦。

30318.title: Non-Tariff Barriers in the U.S.-China Trade War
30318.zh_title: 中美贸易战中的非关税壁垒
30318.authors: Tuo Chen, Chang-Tai Hsieh, Zheng Michael Song
30318.abstract: We use Chinese customs data to show that unofficial non-tariff barriers were responsible for 50\\% of the overall reduction in Chinese imports from the U.S. during the height of the U.S.-China trade war in 2018 and 2019. We infer non-tariff barriers from the change in imports of U.S. products relative to imports from other countries of the same HS-6 product, after controlling for the change in the relative price of U.S. imports to the same product sold by other countries. These barriers were imposed on a small number of agricultural products, did not apply to state-owned importers, and were larger for products where the share of state importers in total imports of the U.S. product was large. Non-tariff barriers were responsible for more than 90\\% of the welfare cost to Chinese consumers of the U.S.-China trade war. The welfare loss to China of a given reduction in imports from the U.S. from non-tariff barriers is about six times larger than an equivalent import decline due to higher tariffs. Non-tariff barriers are more costly compared to tariffs because they applied to some importers and not others, which results in misallocation, and because non-tariff barriers do not generate revenues.
30318.zh_abstract: 我们利用中国海关数据表明，在2018年和2019年中美贸易战高峰期，非官方非关税壁垒导致了中国从美国进口总额减少的50%。我们通过控制美国进口产品相对于其他国家同一HS-6产品进口的相对价格变化，从美国产品进口变化中推断出非关税壁垒。这些壁垒针对少数农产品，不适用于国有进口商，并且对于美国产品进口中国有进口商份额较大的产品，壁垒更大。非关税壁垒造成了中美贸易战中中国消费者福利成本的90%以上。中国因非关税壁垒导致从美国进口减少的福利损失，大约是同等进口下降因关税提高所致损失的六倍。非关税壁垒比关税成本更高，因为它们仅适用于部分进口商而非全部，导致资源错配，并且非关税壁垒不产生收入。

30317.title: Globotics and Macroeconomics: Globalisation and Automation of the Service Sector
30317.zh_title: 全球机器人与宏观经济学：服务业的全球化与自动化
30317.abstract: Globalisation affects the functioning of the macroeconomy. The macroeconomy’s functioning, in turn, conditions the conduct and impact of monetary policy. This is why globalisation matters for central banks. It is also why central bankers should pay attention to the evolution of globalisation. And evolve it has. This paper argues that the future of trade is trade in services – especially trade in intermediate services. Barriers are radically higher and falling radically faster for services versus goods, and, unlike farm and factory goods, there is no capacity constraint when it comes to the export of intermediate services from emerging markets. Undertaking the macroeconomic analysis for services trade that was done in the 2000s for goods trade, however, will require a substantial upgrading of the data available.
30317.zh_abstract: 全球化影响着宏观经济的运行。而宏观经济的运行又制约着货币政策的实施及其影响。这就是全球化对中央银行重要的原因。这也是为什么央行官员应关注全球化演变的原因。而全球化确实在演变。本文认为，贸易的未来在于服务贸易——尤其是中间服务贸易。与商品相比，服务的壁垒要高得多，且下降速度快得多；与农产品和工厂产品不同，新兴市场出口中间服务不存在产能限制。然而，对服务贸易进行2000年代对商品贸易所做的宏观经济分析，将需要大幅提升可用数据的质量。

30316.title: Fertility and Labor Market Responses to Reductions in Mortality
30316.zh_title: 死亡率下降对生育率和劳动力市场的影响
30316.authors: Sonia R. Bhalotra, Atheendar Venkataramani, Selma Walther
30316.abstract: We investigate women’s fertility, labor and marriage market responses to a health innovation that led to reductions in mortality from treatable causes, and especially large declines in child mortality. We find delayed childbearing, with lower intensive and extensive margin fertility, a decline in the chances of ever having married, increased labor force participation and an improvement in occupational status. Our results provide the first evidence that improvements in child survival allow women to start fertility later and invest more in the labor market. We present a new theory of fertility that incorporates dynamic choices and reconciles our findings with existing models of behavior.
30316.zh_abstract: 我们研究了女性在生育、劳动力和婚姻市场方面对一项健康创新的反应，该创新导致可治疗原因导致的死亡率下降，尤其是儿童死亡率大幅下降。我们发现生育推迟，集约边际和广延边际的生育率均降低，结婚概率下降，劳动力参与率提高，职业地位改善。我们的结果首次证明，儿童生存率的提高使女性能够推迟生育并更多地投资于劳动力市场。我们提出了一种新的生育理论，该理论纳入了动态选择，并将我们的发现与现有的行为模型相协调。

30315.title: Spending and Job-Finding Impacts of Expanded Unemployment Benefits: Evidence from Administrative Micro Data
30315.zh_title: 扩大失业救济金的支出和求职影响：来自行政微观数据的证据
30315.authors: Peter Ganong, Fiona E. Greig, Pascal J. Noel, Daniel M. Sullivan, Joseph S. Vavra
30315.abstract: We show that the largest increase in unemployment benefits in U.S. history had large spending impacts and small job-finding impacts. This finding has three implications. First, increased benefits were important for explaining aggregate spending dynamics—but not employment dynamics— during the pandemic. Second, benefit expansions allow us to study the MPC of normally low-liquidity households in a high-liquidity state. These households still have high MPCs. This suggests a role for permanent behavioral characteristics, rather than just current liquidity, in driving spending behavior. Third, the mechanisms driving our results imply that temporary benefit supplements are a promising countercyclical tool.
30315.zh_abstract: 我们表明，美国历史上最大规模的失业救济金增加产生了巨大的支出影响和微小的求职影响。这一发现有三重含义。首先，增加的救济金对于解释疫情期间的总支出动态很重要——但对就业动态不重要。其次，救济金扩张使我们能够研究通常流动性低的家庭在高流动性状态下的边际消费倾向（MPC）。这些家庭仍然具有高MPC。这表明，除了当前流动性外，永久性行为特征在驱动支出行为中也发挥作用。第三，驱动我们结果的机制意味着临时救济金补充是一种有前景的反周期工具。
30315.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：E21, E24, E32, E62, E71, G5, H3, J18, J65

30359.title: Locus of Control and Prosocial Behavior
30359.authors: Mark A. Andor, James Cox, Andreas Gerster, Michael Price, Stephan Sommer, Lukas Tomberg
30359.abstract: We investigate how locus of control beliefs – the extent to which individuals attribute control over events in their life to themselves as opposed to outside factors – affect prosocial behavior and the private provision of public goods. We begin by developing a conceptual framework showing how locus of control beliefs serve as a weight placed on the returns from one’s own contributions (impure altruism) and others contributions (pure altruism). Using multiple data sets from Germany and the U.S., we show that individuals who relate consequences to their own behavior are more likely to contribute to climate change mitigation, to donate money and in-kind gifts to charitable causes, to share money with others, to cast a vote in parliamentary elections, and to donate blood. Our results provide comprehensive evidence that locus of control beliefs affect prosocial behavior.
30359.zh_abstract: 我们研究控制点信念——即个体将生活中事件的控制权归因于自身而非外部因素的程度——如何影响亲社会行为和公共物品的私人供给。我们首先构建了一个概念框架，展示控制点信念如何作为权重，分别作用于个人自身贡献的回报（不纯利他主义）和他人贡献的回报（纯利他主义）。利用来自德国和美国的多个数据集，我们表明，将结果归因于自身行为的个体更有可能为减缓气候变化做出贡献、向慈善事业捐赠金钱和实物礼品、与他人分享金钱、在议会选举中投票以及献血。我们的结果提供了全面的证据，表明控制点信念会影响亲社会行为。

30358.title: What Can Time-Series Regressions Tell Us About Policy Counterfactuals?
30358.zh_title: 时间序列回归能告诉我们关于政策反事实的什么信息？
30358.abstract: We show that, in a general family of linearized structural macroeconomic models, knowledge of the empirically estimable causal effects of contemporaneous and news shocks to the prevailing policy rule is sufficient to construct counterfactuals under alternative policy rules. If the researcher is willing to postulate a loss function, our results furthermore allow her to recover an optimal policy rule for that loss. Under our assumptions, the derived counterfactuals and optimal policies are robust to the Lucas critique. We then discuss strategies for applying these insights when only a limited amount of empirical causal evidence on policy shock transmission is available.
30358.zh_abstract: 我们证明，在一个通用的线性化结构宏观经济模型族中，了解经验上可估计的、现行政策规则下同期冲击和新闻冲击的因果效应，足以构建替代政策规则下的反事实。如果研究者愿意设定一个损失函数，我们的结果还允许她恢复该损失下的最优政策规则。在我们的假设下，推导出的反事实和最优政策对卢卡斯批判是稳健的。然后，我们讨论了在仅有有限的政策冲击传导经验因果证据可用时，应用这些见解的策略。

30357.title: What Do Long Data Tell Us About the Inflation Hike Post COVID-19 Pandemic?
30357.zh_title: 长期数据告诉我们关于COVID-19大流行后通胀飙升的什么信息？
30357.abstract: To what extent is the recent spike in inflation driven by a change in its permanent component? We estimate a semi-structural model of output, inflation, and the nominal interest rate in the United States over the period 1900-2021. The model predicts that between 2019 and 2021 the permanent component of inflation rose by 51 basis points. If instead we estimate the model using postwar data (1955--2021), the permanent component of inflation is predicted to have increased by 238 basis points. A possible interpretation of this finding is that the model estimated on the shorter sample assigns a larger increase in the permanent component of inflation because the period 1955-2021 does not contain sudden sparks in inflation like the one observed in the aftermath of the COVID-19 pandemic but only gradual ones---the great inflation of the 70s took more than 10 years to build up. By contrast, the period 1900-1954 is plagued with sudden inflation hikes---including one around the 1918 Spanish flu pandemic---which the estimated model endogenously recalls and uses to interpret inflation around the COVID-19 episode. This result suggests that prewar data might be of use to understand recent inflation dynamics.
30357.zh_abstract: 近期通胀飙升在多大程度上是由其永久性成分的变化驱动的？我们估计了美国1900年至2021年期间产出、通胀和名义利率的半结构模型。该模型预测，2019年至2021年间，通胀的永久性成分上升了51个基点。如果我们改用战后数据（1955-2021）估计模型，则通胀的永久性成分预计上升了238个基点。对这一发现的一种可能解释是，基于较短样本估计的模型赋予了通胀永久性成分更大的增幅，因为1955-2021年期间没有出现像COVID-19大流行后那样突然的通胀爆发，而只有渐进的通胀——70年代的大通胀花了十多年才形成。相比之下，1900-1954年期间充斥着突然的通胀飙升——包括1918年西班牙流感大流行前后的一次——估计模型内生地回忆起这些事件，并用它们来解释COVID-19事件前后的通胀。这一结果表明，战前数据可能有助于理解近期的通胀动态。

30356.title: Overreaction and Diagnostic Expectations in Macroeconomics
30356.zh_title: 宏观经济学中的过度反应与诊断性预期
30356.authors: Pedro Bordalo, Nicola Gennaioli, Andrei Shleifer
30356.abstract: We present the case for the centrality of overreaction in expectations for addressing important challenges in finance and macroeconomics. First, non-rational expectations by market participants can be measured and modeled in ways that address some of the key challenges posed by the rational expectations revolution, most importantly the idea that economic agents are forward-looking. Second, belief overreaction can account for many long-standing empirical puzzles in macro and finance, which emphasize the extreme volatility and boom-bust dynamics of key time series, such as stock prices, credit, and investment. Third, overreaction relies on psychology and is disciplined by survey data on expectations. This suggests that relaxing the assumption of rational expectations is a promising strategy, helps theory and evidence go together, and offers a unified view of a great deal of data.
30356.zh_abstract: 我们提出了预期过度反应在解决金融和宏观经济学重要挑战中的核心地位。首先，市场参与者的非理性预期可以被测量和建模，以应对理性预期革命提出的一些关键挑战，最重要的是经济主体具有前瞻性的观点。其次，信念过度反应可以解释宏观和金融领域许多长期存在的经验谜题，这些谜题强调了关键时间序列（如股票价格、信贷和投资）的极端波动性和繁荣-萧条动态。第三，过度反应依赖于心理学，并受到预期调查数据的约束。这表明放松理性预期假设是一个有前景的策略，有助于理论和证据相结合，并为大量数据提供了一个统一的视角。

30355.title: Gendered Ageism and Disablism and Employment of Older Workers
30355.zh_title: 性别化的年龄歧视与残疾歧视及老年工人就业
30355.abstract: Gendered discrimination based on age and disability is a pressing issue, because this discrimination can interfere with the goal of lengthening work lives, especially for older women. In the United States, the Age Discrimination in Employment Act and the Americans with Disabilities Act prohibit age and disability discrimination in employment, while Title VII of the Civil Rights Act bars discrimination against women. However, because gender and age (and disability) discrimination fall under different statutes, these laws may be inadequate to protect against discrimination based on gendered ageism and disablism. Legal rulings in the United States generally do not recognize intersecting claims – discrimination based on two or more protected characteristics – when those characteristics are covered by separate statutes. This may help explain the evidence that age discrimination is worse for women than for men.\nWe discuss the theory and methods we can use to analyze these issues, and the relevant laws and their failure to protect women from gendered ageism. We review evidence on gendered age discrimination, and evidence on the effects of discrimination laws and how well they protect from intersectional discrimination. Finally, we discuss potential changes in policies that could better protect against gendered age discrimination.
30355.zh_abstract: 基于年龄和残疾的性别歧视是一个紧迫的问题，因为这种歧视会干扰延长工作寿命的目标，尤其是对老年女性而言。在美国，《就业年龄歧视法》和《美国残疾人法案》禁止就业中的年龄和残疾歧视，而《民权法案》第七章则禁止针对女性的歧视。然而，由于性别、年龄（和残疾）歧视属于不同的法规，这些法律可能不足以保护个人免受基于性别化的年龄歧视和残疾歧视的侵害。美国的法律裁决通常不承认交叉索赔——基于两个或多个受保护特征的歧视——当这些特征由不同的法规涵盖时。这可能有助于解释为什么年龄歧视对女性比男性更严重的证据。我们讨论了可用于分析这些问题的理论和方法，以及相关法律及其未能保护女性免受性别化年龄歧视的缺陷。我们回顾了关于性别化年龄歧视的证据，以及关于歧视法律效果及其在多大程度上保护免受交叉歧视的证据。最后，我们讨论了可能更好地保护免受性别化年龄歧视的政策变化。

30354.title: Invention Value, Inventive Capability and the Large Firm Advantage
30354.zh_title: 发明价值、发明能力与大企业优势
30354.authors: Ashish Arora, Wesley M. Cohen, Honggi Lee, Divya Sebastian
30354.abstract: Do large firms produce more valuable inventions, and if so, why? After confirming that large firms indeed produce more valuable inventions, we consider two possible sources: a superior ability to invent, or a superior ability to extract value from their inventions. We develop a simple model that discriminates between the two explanations. Using a sample of 2,786 public corporations, and measures of both patent quality and patent value, we find that, while average invention value rises with size, average invention quality declines, suggesting, per our model, that the large firm advantage is not due to superior inventive capability, but due to the superior ability to extract value. We provide evidence suggesting that this superior ability to extract value is due to greater commercialization capabilities of larger firms.
30354.zh_abstract: 大企业是否生产更有价值的发明？如果是，原因何在？在确认大企业确实生产更有价值的发明后，我们考虑两种可能的来源：卓越的发明能力，或从发明中提取价值的卓越能力。我们开发了一个简单模型来区分这两种解释。利用2786家上市公司的样本以及专利质量和专利价值的衡量指标，我们发现，虽然平均发明价值随企业规模上升，但平均发明质量却下降。根据我们的模型，这表明大企业的优势并非源于卓越的发明能力，而是源于卓越的价值提取能力。我们提供的证据表明，这种卓越的价值提取能力归因于大企业更强的商业化能力。

30353.title: Imagining the Future: Memory, Simulation and Beliefs about Covid
30353.zh_title: 想象未来：记忆、模拟与关于新冠的信念
30353.authors: Pedro Bordalo, Giovanni Burro, Katherine B. Coffman, Nicola Gennaioli, Andrei Shleifer
30353.abstract: How do people form beliefs about novel risks, with which they have little or no experience? A 2020 US survey of beliefs about the lethality of Covid reveals that the elderly underestimate, and the young overestimate, their own risks, and that people with more health adversities are more pessimistic, even for others. A model in which people selectively recall frequent and similar past experiences, including from other domains, and use them to imagine (simulate) the novel risk, explains our findings. An experience increases perceived risk if it makes that risk easier to imagine, but decreases it by interfering with recall of experiences that fuel imagination. The model yields new predictions on how non-Covid experiences shape beliefs about Covid, for which we find empirical support. These findings cannot be explained by conventional experience effects, and highlight memory mechanisms shaping which experiences are recalled and how they are used to form beliefs.
30353.zh_abstract: 人们如何形成关于几乎毫无经验的新风险的信念？2020年一项关于新冠致死率信念的美国调查显示，老年人低估自身风险，而年轻人高估自身风险；健康状况较差的人更为悲观，即使是对他人的风险也是如此。一个模型解释了我们的发现：人们选择性回忆频繁且相似的过往经历（包括来自其他领域的经历），并利用它们来想象（模拟）新风险。一段经历如果使该风险更容易想象，则会增加感知风险；但如果它干扰了对激发想象的经历的回忆，则会降低感知风险。该模型产生了关于非新冠经历如何塑造新冠信念的新预测，我们找到了实证支持。这些发现无法用传统的经验效应解释，并突显了塑造哪些经历被回忆以及如何被用于形成信念的记忆机制。

30352.title: Corporate Political Spending and State Tax Policy: Evidence from Citizens United
30352.zh_title: 企业政治支出与州税收政策：来自“公民联合”案的证据
30352.authors: Cailin R. Slattery, Alisa Tazhitdinova, Sarah Robinson
30352.abstract: To what extent is U.S. state tax policy affected by corporate political contributions? The 2010 Supreme Court Citizens United v. Federal Election Commission ruling provides an exogenous shock to corporate campaign spending, allowing corporations to spend on elections in 23 states which previously had spending bans. Ten years after the ruling and for a wide range of outcomes, we are not able to identify economically or statistically significant effects of corporate independent expenditures on state tax policy, including tax rates, discretionary tax breaks, and tax revenues.
30352.zh_abstract: 美国州税收政策在多大程度上受到企业政治捐款的影响？2010年最高法院对“公民联合诉联邦选举委员会”案的裁决为企业竞选支出提供了外生冲击，允许企业在先前有支出禁令的23个州进行选举支出。在裁决十年后，针对一系列广泛的结果，我们无法识别出企业独立支出对州税收政策（包括税率、酌情税收减免和税收收入）具有经济上或统计上显著的影响。

30351.title: Consumer Demand with Social Influences: Evidence from an E-Commerce Platform
30351.zh_title: 具有社会影响的消费者需求：来自电商平台的证据
30351.authors: El Hadi Caoui, Chiara Farronato, John J. Horton, Robert Schultz
30351.abstract: For some kinds of goods, rarity itself is valued. "Fashionable'" goods are demanded in part because they are unique. In this paper, we explore the economics of rare goods using auctions of limited-edition shoes held by an e-commerce platform. We model endogenous entry and bidding in multi-unit auctions and construct demand curves from realized bids. We find that doubling inventory reduces willingness to pay by 7-15%. From the producer perspective, ignoring the value of rarity leads to substantial overproduction: auctioned quantities are 82% above the profit-maximizing level. From the consumer perspective however, the negative spillovers of restricting quantity more than offset the benefits of rarer goods.
30351.zh_abstract: 对于某些商品，稀缺性本身就有价值。“时尚”商品之所以被需求，部分原因在于其独特性。在本文中，我们利用电商平台举办的限量版球鞋拍卖来探索稀有商品的经济学。我们对多单位拍卖中的内生进入和出价进行建模，并根据实际出价构建需求曲线。我们发现，库存翻倍会使支付意愿降低7-15%。从生产者角度看，忽视稀缺性价值会导致严重过度生产：拍卖数量比利润最大化水平高出82%。然而，从消费者角度看，限制数量带来的负外部性超过了稀有商品带来的好处。

30350.title: Genetic Endowments, Income Dynamics, and Wealth Accumulation Over the Lifecycle
30350.zh_title: 基因禀赋、收入动态与生命周期中的财富积累
30350.authors: Daniel Barth, Nicholas W. Papageorge, Kevin Thom, Mateo Velásquez-Giraldo
30350.abstract: A growing literature on gene-by-environment (G × E) interactions — much of it concerned with education and human capital — asks how policy and other environmental factors can affect inequality related to genetic factors. Economic models are typically absent from this literature, but could play a vital role in understanding how counterfactual reforms might interact with genetics to shape behavior, outcomes, and welfare. We estimate a life-cycle model of consumption and savings with portfolio decisions, allowing a measure of the genetic endowments that predict educational attainment to directly affect income, labor disutility, stock market participation costs, and returns to risky assets. Our estimates suggest that, even after accounting for completed education, childhood SES, and inheritances, genetic factors linked to educational attainment increase wealth both through life-cycle income profiles and through differences in rates of return on invested wealth. Counterfactual exercises predict how social security reforms would modify the genetic endowment-welfare gradient. Strikingly, some policies may simultaneously flatten gene-wealth gradients but increase gene-welfare inequality. Typical G × E analyses, lacking an optimizing framework, could fail to reveal this distinction. This highlights the value of economic theory in understanding the policy implications of G × E findings, particularly for counterfactual environments.
30350.zh_abstract: 关于基因与环境的交互作用（G×E）的文献日益增多——其中大部分关注教育和人力资本——探讨政策和其他环境因素如何影响与基因因素相关的不平等。经济模型通常缺席于这类文献，但可能在理解反事实改革如何与基因相互作用以塑造行为、结果和福利方面发挥关键作用。我们估计了一个包含消费和储蓄以及投资组合决策的生命周期模型，允许衡量预测教育成就的基因禀赋直接影响收入、劳动负效用、股市参与成本和风险资产回报。我们的估计表明，即使在考虑了已完成教育、童年社会经济地位和遗产之后，与教育成就相关的基因因素既通过生命周期收入曲线，也通过投资财富回报率的差异来增加财富。反事实练习预测了社会保障改革将如何改变基因禀赋与福利之间的梯度。引人注目的是，某些政策可能同时使基因-财富梯度变平，但增加基因-福利不平等。典型的G×E分析缺乏优化框架，可能无法揭示这一区别。这凸显了经济理论在理解G×E发现的政策含义（尤其是针对反事实环境）方面的价值。
30350.meta: Programs：AG；JEL：D14, D15, D31, D63, G50, H31, H55, I38, J24, J26

30349.title: Agency, Gender, and Endowments Effects in the Efficiency and Equity of Team Allocation Decisions
30349.zh_title: 团队分配决策效率与公平中的代理权、性别和禀赋效应
30349.abstract: We conduct a novel lab experiment in which pairs of subjects make separable decisions about allocative efficiency and equity in different agency structures. In terms of equity, subjects appropriate all surplus when they can, and share equally when they have to negotiate. They achieve high efficiency in general, albeit less so when the allocation of surplus is negotiated and negotiations fail. Allocative efficiency is reduced by input and output endowment effects, particularly in negotiated allocation games where subjects seek to create a sense of entitlement over joint surplus so as to achieve a more equitable income distribution. We find few differences across gender or gender pairings. Subjects are then given a choice between negotiating, paying to decide alone, or be paid to let their assigned partner decide. We find that demand for agency or delegation is sensitive to the price of agency, irrespective of gender. But female subjects are more likely to delegate to their partner if it is a male. We also find that a large fraction of both male and female subjects show a preference for negotiating that appears intrinsically motivated.
