30349.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一项新颖的实验室实验，其中成对受试者在不同的代理结构中对分配效率和公平做出可分离的决策。在公平方面，受试者在能够独吞时占有全部剩余，在需要谈判时则平均分享。他们总体上实现了高效率，尽管在剩余分配需要谈判且谈判失败时效率较低。分配效率因投入和产出禀赋效应而降低，尤其是在谈判分配博弈中，受试者试图在联合剩余上创造一种应得权利感，以实现更公平的收入分配。我们在性别或性别配对之间发现很少差异。然后，受试者被给予选择：谈判、付费独自决定、或收费让指定伙伴决定。我们发现，对代理权或委托的需求对代理价格敏感，与性别无关。但女性受试者如果伙伴是男性，则更可能委托给伙伴。我们还发现，很大一部分男性和女性受试者表现出对谈判的偏好，这似乎是内在驱动的。

30348.title: Externalities in the Wildland - Urban Interface: Private Decisions, Collective Action, and Results from Wildfire Simulation Models for California
30348.zh_title: 荒野-城市交界区的外部性：私人决策、集体行动与加州野火模拟模型的结果
30348.authors: Howard Kunreuther, Artem Demidov, Mark Pauly, Matija Turcic, Michael Wilson
30348.abstract: Much of the property damage from wildfires occurs when fires spread into built up areas, the wildland urban interface. Fire spread within such areas occurs from house to house, as embers from one burning structure ignite neighboring ones. Actions can be taken to mitigate the chances that a given house will ignite. This size and configuration of this external benefit depends on the assumed process of fire spread. In this paper we use a simulation model based on plausible parameters to illustrate likely patterns of marginal benefit from mitigation as a function of building density and effectiveness of mitigation. The model indicates that a common pattern is for marginal benefit to unmitigated neighbors to be low at low levels of community mitigation, rise to a maximum, and then fall quickly to a low level. This maximum marginal benefit (known as “herd immunity”) helps to indicate the optimal pattern of mitigation in a community. However individual owners in Nash equilibrium will not take the spillover benefits into account. We use the distribution of house values in a California community relative to an assumed cost of mitigation to illustrate in the model the level of mitigation owners will undertake when they make independent investment decisions, and the corrective actions that can lead to the social optimum. We discuss the use of rules or subsidies for insurance premium adjustments based on mitigation activities. Because it will rarely be optimal to mitigate all homes, the optimal solution may involve unequal treatment and raise equity issues.
30348.zh_abstract: 野火造成的财产损失大部分发生在火势蔓延至建成区（即荒野-城市交界区）时。此类区域内的火势蔓延是逐户进行的，因为一栋燃烧建筑的火星会引燃邻近建筑。可以采取行动来降低特定房屋被引燃的可能性。这种外部收益的大小和配置取决于假定的火势蔓延过程。在本文中，我们使用基于合理参数的模拟模型，来说明缓解措施的边际收益随建筑密度和缓解措施有效性而变化的可能模式。模型表明，一种常见模式是：在社区缓解水平较低时，对未缓解邻居的边际收益较低，然后上升至最大值，之后迅速下降至低水平。这个最大边际收益（即“群体免疫”）有助于指示社区中缓解措施的最优模式。然而，在纳什均衡中，个体房主不会考虑溢出收益。我们利用加州一个社区房屋价值分布相对于假设的缓解成本，在模型中说明房主在独立做出投资决策时会采取的缓解水平，以及能够导致社会最优的纠正措施。我们讨论了基于缓解活动调整保险费的规则或补贴的使用。由于对所有房屋进行缓解很少是最优的，最优解决方案可能涉及不平等对待并引发公平问题。

30347.title: Dynamic Price Competition: Theory and Evidence from Airline Markets
30347.zh_title: 动态价格竞争：理论与来自航空市场的证据
30347.authors: Jose M. Betancourt, Ali Hortaçsu, Aniko Oery, Kevin R. Williams
30347.abstract: We introduce a model of dynamic pricing in perishable goods markets with competition and provide conditions for equilibrium uniqueness. Pricing dynamics are rich because both own and competitor scarcity affect future profits. We identify new competitive forces that can lead to misallocation due to selling units too quickly: the Bertrand scarcity trap. We empirically estimate our model using daily prices and bookings for competing U.S. airlines. We compare competitive equilibrium outcomes to those where firms use pricing heuristics based on observed internal pricing rules at a large airline. We find that pricing heuristics increase revenues (4-5%) and consumer surplus (3%).
30347.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一个具有竞争性的易逝品市场动态定价模型，并提供了均衡唯一性的条件。定价动态是丰富的，因为自身和竞争对手的稀缺性都会影响未来利润。我们识别出可能导致因销售过快而产生错配的新竞争力量：伯特兰稀缺陷阱。我们利用美国竞争性航空公司的每日价格和预订数据来实证估计我们的模型。我们将竞争均衡结果与基于一家大型航空公司内部定价规则观察到的定价启发式方法的结果进行比较。我们发现，定价启发式方法增加了收入（4-5%）和消费者剩余（3%）。
30347.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：C70, C73, D21, D22, D43, D60, L13, L93

30346.title: Causal Narratives
30346.abstract: We study causal narratives – narratives which describe a (potentially incorrect) causal relationship between variables. In a series of experiments across a range of data-generating processes, we show that exogenously generated causal narratives manipulate decisions in ways inconsistent with rational theory. Instead, decisions are generally consistent with a behavioral theory, but with important exceptions, including when subjects face multiple narratives with contradictory recommendations. To study the generation and transmission of causal narratives, we show that they arise endogenously when subjects observe a dataset and provide advice to future subjects. These homegrown causal narratives mislead both the sender and receiver.
30346.zh_abstract: 我们研究因果叙事——即描述变量之间（可能不正确的）因果关系的叙事。在一系列涵盖多种数据生成过程的实验中，我们表明，外生生成的因果叙事会以与理性理论不一致的方式操纵决策。相反，决策通常与行为理论一致，但存在重要例外，包括当受试者面临多个给出矛盾建议的叙事时。为了研究因果叙事的生成与传播，我们表明，当受试者观察数据集并向未来的受试者提供建议时，这些叙事会内生地产生。这些自发产生的因果叙事会误导信息发送者和接收者。

30345.title: Overconfidence and Technology Adoption in Health Care
30345.zh_title: 医疗领域的过度自信与技术采纳
30345.authors: Diego A. Comin, Jonathan S. Skinner, Douglas O. Staiger
30345.abstract: Variation in technology adoption is a key driver of differences in productivity. Previous studies sought to explain variations in technology adoption by heterogeneity in profitability, costs of adoption, or other factors. Less is known about how adoption is affected by bias in the perceived skill to implement the technology. We develop a Bayesian framework in which the use of the technology depends on perceived skill, while the outcomes from using it depend on actual skill. We study the determinants of adoption in the case of implantable cardiac defibrillators (ICDs) for which we document large differences across hospitals in the rate of adoption between 2002-2006, and a strong reversal from 2006-2013. We find that perception bias explains two-thirds of the cross-hospital variation in ICD use. A dynamic version of the model with learning about bias predicts accurately the subsequent decline in ICD use between 2006-2013. These results suggest an important role for misperception in explaining the wide variation in the adoption of new technologies.
30345.zh_abstract: 技术采纳的差异是生产率差异的关键驱动因素。以往研究试图通过盈利能力、采纳成本或其他因素的异质性来解释技术采纳的差异。关于对实施技术所需技能的感知偏差如何影响采纳，我们知之甚少。我们构建了一个贝叶斯框架，其中技术的使用取决于感知技能，而使用技术的结果取决于实际技能。我们以植入式心脏复律除颤器（ICD）为例研究采纳的决定因素，发现2002年至2006年间各医院在ICD采纳率上存在巨大差异，并在2006年至2013年间出现强烈逆转。我们发现，感知偏差解释了医院间ICD使用差异的三分之二。一个包含关于偏差学习的动态模型准确预测了2006年至2013年间ICD使用的后续下降。这些结果表明，误解在解释新技术采纳的广泛差异中扮演着重要角色。

30344.title: Scapegoating and Discrimination in Times of Crisis: Evidence from Airbnb
30344.zh_title: 危机时期的替罪羊与歧视：来自Airbnb的证据
30344.authors: Michael Luca, Elizaveta Pronkina, Michelangelo Rossi
30344.abstract: We present evidence that discrimination against Asian-American Airbnb users sharply increased at the start of the COVID-19 pandemic. Using a DiD approach, we find that hosts with distinctively Asian names experienced a 20 percent decline in guests relative to hosts with distinctively White names. In contrast, we do not see spikes in discrimination against Black or Hispanic hosts. Our results suggest that the rise in anti-Asian sentiment in 2020 translated to discrimination in economic activity, highlighting the ways in which scapegoating minority groups can shape markets. Our results also point to the role of platform design choices in enabling discrimination.
30344.zh_abstract: 我们提供的证据表明，在COVID-19大流行开始时，针对亚裔美国Airbnb用户的歧视急剧增加。使用双重差分方法，我们发现，与具有明显白人名字的房东相比，具有明显亚裔名字的房东的客人数量下降了20%。相比之下，我们没有观察到针对黑人或西班牙裔房东的歧视激增。我们的结果表明，2020年反亚裔情绪的上升转化为经济活动中的歧视，凸显了将少数群体作为替罪羊可能塑造市场的方式。我们的结果也指出了平台设计选择在助长歧视方面的作用。

30343.title: The Next Wave of Energy Innovation: Which Technologies? Which Skills?
30343.zh_title: 下一波能源创新：哪些技术？哪些技能？
30343.authors: David Popp, Francesco Vona, Myriam Gregoire-Zawilski, Giovanni Marin
30343.abstract: The costs of low-carbon energy fell dramatically over the past decade, leading to rapid growth in its deployment. However, many challenges remain to deploy low-carbon energy at a scale necessary to meet net zero carbon emission targets. If net zero goals are to be met, developing complementary technologies and skills will be a necessary part of the next wave of low-carbon energy innovation. These include both improvements in physical capital, such as smart grids to aid integration of intermittent renewables, and human capital, to develop the skills workers need for a low-carbon economy. We document recent trends in energy innovation and discuss the lessons learnt for policy. We then discuss the potential role for complementary innovation in both physical capital—using smart grids as an example of how policy can help—and human capital, where we show how a task approach to labor informs policy and research on the worker skills needed for the energy transition.
30343.zh_abstract: 过去十年，低碳能源成本大幅下降，导致其部署快速增长。然而，要以实现净零碳排放目标所需的规模部署低碳能源，仍面临许多挑战。如果要实现净零目标，开发互补性技术和技能将是下一波低碳能源创新的必要组成部分。这包括物质资本的改进，例如有助于整合间歇性可再生能源的智能电网，以及人力资本，以培养工人在低碳经济中所需的技能。我们记录了能源创新的近期趋势，并讨论了政策方面的经验教训。然后，我们讨论了物质资本（以智能电网为例说明政策如何提供帮助）和人力资本中互补性创新的潜在作用，在人力资本方面，我们展示了劳动的任务方法如何为能源转型所需的工人技能的政策和研究提供信息。
30343.meta: Programs：EEE, PR；JEL：J24, O31, O38, Q42, Q55

30342.title: How Worker Productivity and Wages Grow with Tenure and Experience: The Firm Perspective
30342.zh_title: 工人生产率和工资如何随任期和经验增长：企业视角
30342.authors: Andrew Caplin, Minjoon Lee, Søren Leth-Petersen, Johan Saeverud, Matthew D. Shapiro
30342.abstract: How worker productivity evolves with tenure and experience is central to economics, shaping, for example, life-cycle earnings and the losses from involuntary job separation. Yet, worker-level productivity is hard to identify from observational data. This paper introduces direct measurement of worker productivity in a firm survey designed to separate the role of on-the-job tenure from total experience in determining productivity growth. A key innovation is to elicit what managers know about the productivity of their workers. Several findings emerge concerning the initial period on the job. (1) On-the-job productivity growth exceeds wage growth, consistent with wages not being allocative period-by-period. (2) Previous experience is a substitute, but a far less than perfect one, for on-the-job tenure. (3) There is substantial heterogeneity across jobs in the extent to which previous experience substitutes for tenure. The survey makes use of administrative data to construct a representative sample of firms, check for selective non-response, validate survey measures with administrative measures, and calibrate parameters not measured in the survey.
30342.zh_abstract: 工人生产率如何随任期和经验演变是经济学的核心问题，例如，它塑造了生命周期收入和因非自愿离职造成的损失。然而，从观测数据中识别工人层面的生产率是困难的。本文介绍了一项企业调查中对工人生产率的直接测量，该调查旨在区分在职任期与总经验在决定生产率增长中的作用。一个关键创新是引出管理者对其工人生产率的了解。关于工作初始阶段，出现了几个发现。（1）在职生产率增长超过工资增长，这与工资并非逐期配置的观点一致。（2）先前经验是任期的一种替代，但远非完美替代。（3）在不同工作中，先前经验替代任期的程度存在显著异质性。该调查利用行政数据构建了具有代表性的企业样本，检查了选择性无应答，用行政测量验证了调查测量，并校准了调查中未测量的参数。

30341.title: Intergenerational Spillover Effects of Language Training for Refugees
30341.zh_title: 难民语言培训的代际溢出效应
30341.authors: Mette Foged, Linea Hasager, Giovanni Peri, Jacob N. Arendt, Iben Bolvig
30341.abstract: Children of refugees are among the most economically disadvantaged youth in several European countries. They are more likely to drop out of school and to commit crime. We show that a reform in Denmark in 1999, that expanded language training for adult refugees and improved their economic integration, had significant intergenerational spillover effects in terms of higher completion rates from lower secondary school and lower juvenile crime rates. The effects on crime are driven by boys who were below school-starting age when their parents were treated.
30341.zh_abstract: 在几个欧洲国家，难民子女是经济上最弱势的青少年群体之一。他们更有可能辍学和犯罪。我们表明，丹麦1999年的一项改革——该改革扩大了成年难民的语言培训并改善了他们的经济融合——在提高初中毕业率和降低青少年犯罪率方面产生了显著的代际溢出效应。对犯罪的影响主要由那些在父母接受培训时尚未达到入学年龄的男孩驱动。

30389.title: New Frontiers: The Origins and Content of New Work, 1940–2018
30389.zh_title: 新前沿：1940-2018年新工作的起源与内容
30389.authors: David Autor, Caroline Chin, Anna M. Salomons, Bryan Seegmiller
30389.abstract: We address three core questions about the hypothesized role of newly emerging job categories ('new work') in counterbalancing the erosive effect of task-displacing automation on labor demand: what is the substantive content of new work; where does it come from; and what effect does it have on labor demand? To address these questions, we construct a novel database spanning eight decades of new job titles linked both to US Census microdata and to patent-based measures of occupations’ exposure to labor-augmenting and labor-automating innovations. We find, first, that the majority of current employment is in new job specialties introduced after 1940, but the locus of new work creation has shifted—from middle-paid production and clerical occupations over 1940–1980, to high-paid professional and, secondarily, low-paid services since 1980. Second, new work emerges in response to technological innovations that complement the outputs of occupations and demand shocks that raise occupational demand; conversely, innovations that automate tasks or reduce occupational demand slow new work emergence. Third, although flows of augmentation and automation innovations are positively correlated across occupations, the former boosts occupational labor demand while the latter depresses it. Harnessing shocks to the flow of augmentation and automation innovations spurred by breakthrough innovations two decades earlier, we establish that the effects of augmentation and automation innovations on new work emergence and occupational labor demand are causal. Finally, our results suggest that the demand-eroding effects of automation innovations have intensified in the last four decades while the demand-increasing effects of augmentation innovations have not.
30389.zh_abstract: 我们解决了关于新出现的工作类别（“新工作”）在抵消任务替代型自动化对劳动力需求的侵蚀效应方面的假设作用的三个核心问题：新工作的实质内容是什么；它从何而来；它对劳动力需求有何影响？为了解决这些问题，我们构建了一个跨越八十年、包含新职位名称的新数据库，该数据库与美国人口普查微观数据以及基于专利的职业暴露于劳动增强型和劳动自动化型创新的衡量指标相关联。我们发现，首先，当前大多数就业岗位是在1940年后引入的新工作专业中，但新工作创造的焦点已经转移——从1940-1980年中等收入的生产和文职职业，转向1980年以来高收入的专业职业以及次要的低收入服务业。其次，新工作的出现是对补充职业产出的技术创新和提高职业需求的需求冲击的回应；相反，自动化任务或降低职业需求的创新会减缓新工作的出现。第三，尽管增强型和自动化型创新的流动在各职业间呈正相关，但前者提升职业劳动力需求，而后者则抑制它。利用二十年前突破性创新引发的增强型和自动化型创新流动的冲击，我们确定了增强型和自动化型创新对新工作出现和职业劳动力需求的影响是因果性的。最后，我们的结果表明，自动化创新对需求侵蚀的影响在过去四十年中加剧，而增强型创新对需求增加的影响则没有。

30388.title: Does Occupational Licensing Reduce Value Creation on Digital Platforms?
30388.zh_title: 职业许可会减少数字平台的价值创造吗？
30388.abstract: We test whether occupational licensing undercuts a key goal of digital marketplaces— to increase social surplus by increasing the effectiveness of customer search. Our setting is a large online marketplace in the $\$500$B home services industry where a platform converts customer search into sales leads that are accepted for purchase by service providers on the platform. For each of the 21 million observations in our data set, we observe task-level variation in the state licensing requirements that service providers must meet to operate on the platform. Exploiting two natural experiments, we find that licensing reduces the accept rate of sales leads by an average of 25 percent. The accept rate drops because licensing reduces the aggregate labor supply of workers on the platform and not because licensing increases the volume of customer search. We develop a model and derive analytic expressions for the impact of licensing on the welfare of consumers, service providers and the platform as a function of seven sufficient statistics which we estimate from the data. We find that licensing a task reduces service provider surplus and platform surplus without increasing consumer surplus.
30388.zh_abstract: 我们检验职业许可是否削弱了数字市场的一个关键目标——通过提高客户搜索的有效性来增加社会剩余。我们的背景是一个价值5000亿美元的家居服务行业的大型在线市场，在该市场中，平台将客户搜索转化为销售线索，由平台上的服务提供商接受购买。在我们的数据集的2100万个观测值中，每个观测值都观察到服务提供商在平台上运营必须满足的州许可要求的任务层面差异。利用两个自然实验，我们发现许可使销售线索的接受率平均降低了25%。接受率下降是因为许可减少了平台上工人的总劳动力供给，而不是因为许可增加了客户搜索量。我们开发了一个模型，并推导出许可对消费者、服务提供商和平台福利影响的解析表达式，该表达式是七个充分统计量的函数，我们从数据中估计了这些统计量。我们发现，许可一项任务会减少服务提供商剩余和平台剩余，而不会增加消费者剩余。
30388.meta: Programs：ED, LE, LS, PR；JEL：D60, J44, L51, L86

30387.title: Where Have All the Workers Gone? Recalls, Retirements, and Reallocation in the COVID Recovery
30387.zh_title: 工人都去哪儿了？COVID复苏中的召回、退休与重新配置
30387.authors: Eliza Forsythe, Lisa B. Kahn, Fabian Lange, David G. Wiczer
30387.abstract: At the onset of the COVID pandemic, the U.S. economy suddenly and swiftly lost 20 million jobs. Over the next two years, the economy has been on the recovery path. We assess the labor market two years into the COVID crisis. We show that early employment dynamics were almost entirely driven by temporary layoffs and later recalls. Taking these into account, we show that the labor market remained surprisingly tight throughout the crisis, despite the dramatic job losses. By spring, 2022, the labor market had largely recovered and was characterized by extremely tight markets and a slightly depressed employment-to-population ratio driven largely by retirements. Finally, we see surprisingly little evidence of excess reallocation, despite predictions that COVID would dramatically and permanently change the way we live and work. We do see that employment has reallocated somewhat away from low-skilled service jobs, and, in light of the job vacancy patterns, conclude that worker preferences or changes in job amenities are driving this shift. In addition, the retirements paved the way for movements up the job ladder, making low-skilled customer-facing jobs even less desirable.
30387.zh_abstract: 在COVID大流行初期，美国经济突然且迅速地失去了2000万个工作岗位。在接下来的两年里，经济一直处于复苏轨道。我们评估了COVID危机两年后的劳动力市场。我们表明，早期的就业动态几乎完全由临时裁员和后来的召回驱动。考虑到这些，我们表明，尽管就业岗位大幅减少，但劳动力市场在整个危机期间仍然出人意料地紧张。到2022年春季，劳动力市场已基本复苏，其特点是市场极度紧张，就业人口比率略有下降，这主要是由退休驱动的。最后，尽管有预测称COVID将戏剧性地、永久地改变我们的生活和工作方式，但我们几乎没有看到过度重新配置的证据。我们确实看到，就业已经从低技能服务岗位有所重新配置，并且根据职位空缺模式，我们得出结论，工人偏好或工作便利条件的变化正在推动这种转变。此外，退休为沿着职业阶梯向上流动铺平了道路，使得低技能面向客户的工作变得更加不受欢迎。
30387.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, LS；JEL：E24, E32, J21, J23, J26

30386.title: The Impact of Diversity on Perceptions of Income Distribution and Preferences for Redistribution
30386.zh_title: 多样性对收入分配认知与再分配偏好的影响
30386.abstract: Does diversity affect people’s perceptions of income distribution and their preferences for redistribution? I leverage variation from a Colombian financial aid reform boosting the share of low-income students at an elite university. Combining college records and original survey data, I study how diversity affects high-income students’ social networks, perceptions, and preferences by exploiting treatment variation across cohorts and majors using difference-in-differences. Exposure to low-income peers caused high-income students to diversify their social networks, have more accurate perceptions of the income distribution, and support progressive redistribution. My preferred interpretation is that diversity raised students’ concerns about (the lack of) equal opportunity.
30386.zh_abstract: 多样性是否会影响人们对收入分配的认知及其再分配偏好？我利用哥伦比亚一项财政援助改革带来的变化，该改革提高了某精英大学中低收入学生的比例。结合大学记录和原始调查数据，我通过双重差分法，利用不同年级和专业间的处理差异，研究多样性如何影响高收入学生的社交网络、认知和偏好。接触低收入同龄人促使高收入学生多元化其社交网络，更准确地认知收入分配，并支持累进式再分配。我更倾向的解释是，多样性提高了学生对（缺乏）机会平等的关注。

30385.title: Family Formation and Crime
30385.authors: Maxim N. Massenkoff, Evan K. Rose
30385.abstract: We use administrative data from Washington State to perform a large-scale analysis of the impact of family formation on crime. Our estimates indicate that pregnancy triggers sharp declines in arrests rivaling any known intervention, supporting the view that childbirth is a "turning point" that reduces deviant behavior through social bonds. For mothers, criminal arrests drop precipitously in the first few months of pregnancy, stabilizing at half of pre-pregnancy levels three years after birth. Men show a sustained 20 percent decline in crime that begins at pregnancy, although arrests for domestic violence spike at birth. These effects are concentrated among first-time parents, suggesting that a permanent change in preferences---rather than transitory time and budget shocks---may be responsible. A separate design using parents of stillborn children to estimate counterfactual arrest rates reinforces the main findings. Marriage, in contrast, is not associated with any sudden changes and marks the completion of a gradual 50 percent decline in arrests for both men and women.
30385.zh_abstract: 我们利用华盛顿州的行政数据，对家庭组建对犯罪的影响进行了大规模分析。我们的估计表明，怀孕引发了逮捕率的急剧下降，其效果可与任何已知干预措施相媲美，这支持了生育是一个通过社会纽带减少越轨行为的“转折点”的观点。对于母亲而言，刑事逮捕在怀孕头几个月急剧下降，并在产后三年稳定在孕前水平的一半。男性在怀孕开始时犯罪率持续下降20%，尽管家庭暴力逮捕在生育时激增。这些效应集中在初为父母的人群中，表明可能是偏好的永久性改变——而非暂时的时间和预算冲击——导致了这一结果。另一个利用死产儿父母来估算反事实逮捕率的设计，进一步强化了主要发现。相比之下，婚姻与任何突然变化无关，而是标志着男性和女性逮捕率均逐步下降50%的完成。

30384.title: Internal Migration in the United States: Rates, Selection, and Destination Choice, 1850-1940
30384.zh_title: 美国国内移民：1850-1940年的迁移率、选择性及目的地选择
30384.abstract: I study the internal migration of native-born white men in the United States using linked census data covering all possible 10- and 20-year periods 1850--1940. Inter-county migration rates were stable over time. Selection into migration on the basis of occupational status was also largely stable and was neutral or slightly negative. But the orientation of internal migration changed, declining in distance, becoming more directed towards the west, and increasingly driving urbanization. These patterns changed in the 1930s as migration became less common and less urban oriented. These results provide a clearer understanding of historic US internal migration than previously possible.
30384.zh_abstract: 我利用覆盖1850年至1940年间所有可能的10年和20年周期的关联人口普查数据，研究了美国本土出生的白人男性的国内移民。跨县迁移率随时间保持稳定。基于职业地位向移民的选择性也基本稳定，且呈中性或轻微负向。但国内移民的方向发生了变化：迁移距离缩短，更倾向于向西迁移，并日益推动城市化。这些模式在1930年代发生改变，移民变得不那么普遍，且城市化导向减弱。这些结果比以往更清晰地揭示了美国历史上的国内移民模式。

30383.title: Broadband Internet and the Stock Market Investments of Individual Investors
30383.zh_title: 宽带互联网与个人投资者的股票市场投资
30383.authors: Hans K. Hvide, Tom G. Meling, Magne Mogstad, Ola L. Vestad
30383.abstract: We study the effects of broadband internet use on the investment decisions of individual investors. A public program in Norway provides plausibly exogenous variation in internet use. Our instrumental variables estimates show that internet use causes a substantial increase in stock market participation, driven primarily by increased fund ownership. Existing investors tilt their portfolios towards funds, thereby obtaining more diversified portfolios and higher Sharpe ratios, and do not increase their trading activity in stocks. Overall, access to high-speed internet seems to spur a “democratization of finance”, with individuals making investment decisions that are more in line with the advice from portfolio theory.
30383.zh_abstract: 我们研究了宽带互联网使用对个人投资者投资决策的影响。挪威的一项公共项目提供了互联网使用的外生性变化。我们的工具变量估计表明，互联网使用导致股市参与率大幅增加，这主要由基金持有量的增加驱动。现有投资者将其投资组合向基金倾斜，从而获得更多元化的投资组合和更高的夏普比率，并且没有增加股票交易活动。总体而言，高速互联网的接入似乎促进了“金融民主化”，使个人做出的投资决策更符合投资组合理论的建议。
30383.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：D04, D14, D15, G00, G11, G40

30382.title: Eviction and Poverty in American Cities
30382.zh_title: 美国城市中的驱逐与贫困
30382.authors: Robert Collinson, John Eric Humphries, Nicholas S. Mader, Davin K. Reed, Daniel I. Tannenbaum, Winnie van Dijk
30382.abstract: More than two million U.S. households have an eviction case filed against them each year. Policymakers at the federal, state, and local levels are increasingly pursuing policies to reduce the number of evictions, citing harm to tenants and high public expenditures related to homelessness. We study the consequences of eviction for tenants using newly linked administrative data from two major urban areas: Cook County (which includes Chicago) and New York City. We document that prior to housing court, tenants experience declines in earnings and employment and increases in financial distress and hospital visits. These pre-trends pose a challenge for disentangling correlation and causation. To address this problem, we use an instrumental variables approach based on cases randomly assigned to judges of varying leniency. We find that an eviction order increases homelessness and hospital visits and reduces earnings, durable goods consumption, and access to credit in the first two years. Effects on housing and labor market outcomes are driven by impacts for female and Black tenants. In the longer-run, eviction increases indebtedness and reduces credit scores.
30382.zh_abstract: 每年有超过两百万美国家庭面临驱逐诉讼。联邦、州和地方各级政策制定者正越来越多地推行减少驱逐数量的政策，理由是驱逐对租户造成伤害，并与无家可归相关的高额公共支出有关。我们利用来自两个主要城市地区——库克县（包括芝加哥）和纽约市——的新关联行政数据，研究了驱逐对租户的后果。我们记录到，在住房法庭审理之前，租户的收入和就业率下降，财务困境和就医次数增加。这些事前趋势给区分相关性和因果关系带来了挑战。为解决这一问题，我们采用了一种基于案件随机分配给宽严程度不同的法官的工具变量方法。我们发现，驱逐令在头两年内增加了无家可归和就医次数，并降低了收入、耐用品消费和信贷获取。对住房和劳动力市场结果的影响主要由女性和黑人租户驱动。从长期来看，驱逐增加了债务并降低了信用评分。
30382.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I30, I32, J01, R0, R28, R38

30381.title: Scared Straight? Threat and Assimilation of Refugees in Germany
30381.zh_title: 恐吓还是同化？威胁对德国难民融入的影响
30381.authors: Philipp Jaschke, Sulin Sardoschau, Marco Tabellini
30381.abstract: This paper studies the effects of threat on convergence to local culture and economic assimilation of refugees, exploiting plausibly exogenous variation in their allocation across German regions between 2013 and 2016. We combine novel survey data on cultural preferences and economic outcomes of refugees with corresponding information on locals, and construct a threat index that integrates contemporaneous and historical variables. On average, refugees assimilate both culturally and economically. However, while refugees assigned to more hostile regions converge to local culture more quickly, they do not exhibit faster economic assimilation. Our evidence suggests that refugees exert more assimilation effort in response to local threat, but do not integrate faster because of higher discrimination in more hostile regions.
30381.zh_abstract: 本文研究了威胁对难民融入当地文化及经济同化的影响，利用了2013年至2016年间难民在德国各地区分配的外生性变化。我们将关于难民文化偏好和经济结果的新调查数据与当地人的相应信息相结合，并构建了一个整合了同期和历史变量的威胁指数。平均而言，难民在文化和经济上都实现了同化。然而，尽管被分配到更敌对地区的难民更快地融入当地文化，但他们并未表现出更快的经济同化。我们的证据表明，难民为应对当地威胁而付出了更多的同化努力，但由于在更敌对地区面临更高的歧视，他们并未实现更快的经济融合。

30380.title: Rationing by Race
30380.abstract: We document how deepening resource scarcity results in rationing on the basis of race in a high-stakes setting: health care. Using detailed, time-stamped data on 107,000 inpatient admissions to a large health system, we find that in-hospital mortality increases for Black, but not White, patients as hospitals reach capacity. These findings are not explained by differential patient selection. We identify rationing by wait times as a mechanism, documenting that sicker Black patients wait longer for care than healthier White patients at almost all capacity levels. Text analysis of unstructured clinical notes reveals rationing of provider effort as another mechanism.
30380.zh_abstract: 我们记录了在一个高风险环境——医疗保健中，资源日益稀缺如何导致基于种族的配给。利用一个大型医疗系统107,000名住院患者的详细时间戳数据，我们发现，当医院达到容量时，黑人患者的院内死亡率上升，而白人患者则没有。这些发现无法用患者选择的差异来解释。我们识别出等待时间配给是一个机制，记录到在几乎所有容量水平下，病情更重的黑人患者比病情较轻的白人患者等待更长时间。对非结构化临床笔记的文本分析揭示了医疗服务提供者努力配给是另一个机制。

30379.title: Unconditional Cash and Family Investments in Infants: Evidence from a Large-Scale Cash Transfer Experiment in the U.S.
30379.zh_title: 无条件现金与家庭对婴儿的投资：来自美国大规模现金转移实验的证据
30379.authors: Lisa A. Gennetian, Greg Duncan, Nathan A. Fox, Katherine Magnuson, Sarah Halpern-Meekin, Kimberly G. Noble, Hirokazu Yoshikawa
30379.abstract: A key policy question in evaluating social programs to address childhood poverty is how families receiving unconditional financial support would spend those funds. Economists have limited empirical evidence on this topic in the U.S. We provide causal estimates of financial and time investments in infants among families living in poverty from a large-scale, multi-site randomized controlled study of monthly unconditional cash transfers starting at the time of a child’s birth. We find that the cash transfers increased spending on child-specific goods and mothers’ early-learning activities with their infants. The marginal propensity to consume child-focused items from the cash transfer exceeded that from other income, consistent with the behavioral cues in the cash transfer design. We find no statistically detectable offsets in household earnings nor statistically detectable impacts in other pre-registered outcomes related to general household expenditures, maternal labor supply, infants’ time in childcare, or mothers’ subjective well-being.
30379.zh_abstract: 在评估解决儿童贫困的社会项目时，一个关键的政策问题是，获得无条件经济支持的家庭将如何花费这些资金。经济学家在美国对此问题的实证证据有限。我们通过一项大规模、多地点随机对照研究，提供了对贫困家庭中婴儿的财务和时间投资的因果估计，该研究从孩子出生时开始每月提供无条件现金转移。我们发现，现金转移增加了用于儿童特定商品的支出以及母亲与婴儿进行的早期学习活动。来自现金转移的儿童焦点物品的边际消费倾向超过了来自其他收入的边际消费倾向，这与现金转移设计中的行为提示一致。我们没有发现家庭收入在统计上可检测的抵消效应，也没有发现其他预先登记的结果（如一般家庭支出、母亲劳动力供给、婴儿在托儿所的时间或母亲的主观幸福感）在统计上可检测的影响。
30379.meta: Programs：CH；JEL：D13, H31, I30, J13, J18, J22

30378.title: Not Learning from Others
30378.authors: John J. Conlon, Malavika Mani, Gautam Rao, Matthew W. Ridley, Frank Schilbach
30378.abstract: We study social learning using experiments where two people independently learn relevant information and can share it to make accurate private decisions. Across three experiments, people are substantially less sensitive to information others discover than to equally-relevant information they discovered themselves. This holds when they must learn information from others through discussion; when the experimenter perfectly communicates the information; and even when participants observe others’ information with their own eyes. Our results therefore stem not from a failure to elicit information from others but a systematic tendency to underweight it relative to one’s own information. Our findings illustrate a powerful barrier to social learning that might underlie many documented cases of failure to learn from others.
30378.zh_abstract: 我们通过实验研究社会学习，实验中两人独立学习相关信息，并可以分享这些信息以做出准确的私人决策。在三个实验中，人们对他人发现的信息的敏感度远低于对自己发现的同等相关信息。这种情况发生在他们必须通过讨论从他人那里学习信息时；当实验者完美地传达信息时；甚至当参与者亲眼观察到他人的信息时也是如此。因此，我们的结果并非源于未能从他人那里获取信息，而是源于一种系统性的倾向，即相对于自己的信息，低估他人的信息。我们的发现揭示了社会学习的一个强大障碍，这可能构成了许多记录在案的未能向他人学习案例的基础。

30377.title: The German Model of Industrial Relations: Balancing Flexibility and Collective Action
30377.zh_title: 德国劳资关系模式：平衡灵活性与集体行动
30377.authors: Simon Jäger, Shakked Noy, Benjamin Schoefer
30377.abstract: We give an overview of the “German model” of industrial relations. We organize our review by focusing on the two pillars of the model: sectoral collective bargaining and firm-level codetermination. Relative to the United States, Germany outsources collective bargaining to the sectoral level, resulting in higher coverage and the avoidance of firm-level distributional conflict. Relative to other European countries, Germany makes it easy for employers to avoid coverage or use flexibility provisions to deviate downwards from collective agreements. The greater flexibility of the German system may reduce unemployment, but may also erode bargaining coverage and increase inequality. Meanwhile, firm-level codetermination through worker board representation and works councils creates cooperative dialogue between employers and workers. Board representation has few direct impacts owing to worker representatives’ minority vote share, but works councils, which hold a range of substantive powers, may be more impactful. Overall, the German model highlights tensions between efficiency-enhancing flexibility and equity-enhancing collective action.\n
30377.zh_abstract: 我们概述了劳资关系的“德国模式”。我们通过聚焦该模式的两大支柱来组织我们的回顾：行业集体谈判和企业层面的共同决策。相对于美国，德国将集体谈判外包给行业层面，从而提高了覆盖率并避免了企业层面的分配冲突。相对于其他欧洲国家，德国使雇主很容易避免覆盖或利用灵活性条款向下偏离集体协议。德国体系更大的灵活性可能降低失业率，但也可能侵蚀谈判覆盖率并加剧不平等。与此同时，通过工人董事会代表和劳资委员会实现的企业层面共同决策，在雇主和工人之间创造了合作对话。由于工人代表的少数投票权，董事会代表的直接影响很小，但拥有实质性权力的劳资委员会可能更具影响力。总体而言，德国模式凸显了提高效率的灵活性与增强公平的集体行动之间的张力。
30377.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：E0, H0, J0

30376.title: A Model of Intangible Capital
30376.authors: Nicolas Crouzet, Janice C. Eberly, Andrea L. Eisfeldt, Dimitris Papanikolaou
30376.abstract: We propose a model that starts from the premise that intangible capital needs to be stored on some medium --- software, patents, essential employees --- before it can be utilized in production. Storage implies that intangible capital may be partially non-rival within the firm, leading to scale economies. However, storage can also compromise the ability of the firm to fully appropriate the returns generated by intangibles. We explore the implications of these two mechanisms for firm scale, scope, and investment decisions, and we outline their connection to recent macroeconomic and financial trends in the US.
30376.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个模型，其出发点是无形的资本需要存储在某种介质上——软件、专利、关键员工——然后才能用于生产。存储意味着无形资本在企业内部可能部分非竞争，从而导致规模经济。然而，存储也可能损害企业完全获取无形资产所产生回报的能力。我们探讨了这两种机制对企业规模、范围和投资决策的影响，并概述了它们与美国近期宏观经济和金融趋势的联系。
30376.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, PR；JEL：E01, E22, G11, G31, O34

30375.title: Why Don't We Sleep Enough? A Field Experiment Among College Students
30375.zh_title: 为什么我们睡眠不足？一项针对大学生的实地实验
30375.authors: Mallory L. Avery, Osea Giuntella, Peiran Jiao
30375.abstract: This study investigates the mechanisms affecting sleep choice and explores whether commitment devices and monetary incentives can be used to promote healthier sleep habits. To this end, we conducted a field experiment with college students, providing them incentives to sleep and collecting data from wearable activity trackers, surveys, and time-use diaries. Monetary incentives were effective in increasing sleep duration with some evidence of persistence after the incentive was removed. We uncover evidence of demand for commitment. Our results are consistent with partially sophisticated time-inconsistent preferences and overconfidence, and have implications for the effectiveness of information interventions on sleep choice.
30375.zh_abstract: 本研究调查了影响睡眠选择的机制，并探讨是否可以利用承诺机制和金钱激励来促进更健康的睡眠习惯。为此，我们对大学生进行了一项实地实验，为他们提供睡眠激励，并通过可穿戴活动追踪器、调查和时间使用日记收集数据。金钱激励在增加睡眠时长方面是有效的，并且在激励取消后有一些持续性的证据。我们发现了对承诺需求的证据。我们的结果与部分老练的时间不一致偏好和过度自信一致，并对信息干预对睡眠选择的有效性具有启示意义。

30374.title: The Impact of Team Incentives on Performance in Graduate School: Evidence from Two Pilot RCTs
30374.zh_title: 团队激励对研究生学业表现的影响：来自两项试点随机对照试验的证据
30374.abstract: In organizations, teams are ubiquitous. “Weakest Link” and “Best Shot” are incentive schemes that tie a group member’s compensation to the output of their group’s least and most productive member, respectively. In this paper, we test the impact of these incentive schemes by conducting two pilot RCTs (one in-person, one online), which included more than 250 graduate students in a graduate math class. Students were placed in study groups of three or four students, and then groups were randomized to either control, Weakest Link, or Best Shot incentives. We find evidence that such incentive approaches can affect test scores, both in-person and online.
30374.zh_abstract: 在组织中，团队无处不在。“最弱环节”和“最佳射手”是激励方案，分别将团体成员的报酬与其团体中效率最低和最高成员的产出挂钩。在本文中，我们通过进行两项试点随机对照试验（一项线下，一项线上）来测试这些激励方案的影响，试验对象包括一个研究生数学班上的250多名研究生。学生被分成三人或四人的学习小组，然后小组被随机分配到对照组、最弱环节激励或最佳射手激励。我们发现证据表明，这种激励方法可以影响考试成绩，无论是在线下还是线上。
30374.meta: Programs：ED, LS；JEL：C9, C93, D79, I2, J3

30373.title: Investing in Infants: The Lasting Effects of Cash Transfers to New Families
30373.zh_title: 投资于婴儿：对新家庭现金转移的持久影响
30373.authors: Andrew C. Barr, Jonathan Eggleston, Alexander A. Smith
30373.abstract: We provide new evidence that cash transfers following the birth of a first child can have large and long-lasting effects on that child’s outcomes. We take advantage of the January 1 birthdate cutoff for U.S. child-related tax benefits, which results in families of otherwise similar children receiving substantially different refunds during the first year of life. For the average low-income single-child family in our sample this difference amounts to roughly $\$1,300,$ or 10 percent of income. Using the universe of administrative federal tax data in selected years, we show that this transfer in infancy increases young adult earnings by at least 1 to 2 percent, with larger effects for males. These effects show up at earlier ages in terms of improved math and reading test scores and a higher likelihood of high school graduation. The observed effects on shorter-run parental outcomes suggest that additional liquidity during the critical window following the birth of a first child leads to persistent increases in family income that likely contribute to the downstream effects on children’s outcomes. The longer-term effects on child earnings alone are large enough that the transfer pays for itself through subsequent increases in federal income tax revenue.
30373.zh_abstract: 我们提供了新的证据，表明在第一个孩子出生后进行的现金转移可能对该孩子的结果产生巨大而持久的影响。我们利用了美国与儿童相关的税收优惠的1月1日出生日期截止点，这导致其他方面相似的孩子的家庭在出生后第一年获得截然不同的退税。在我们样本中，对于平均低收入单孩家庭来说，这一差额约为1300美元，占收入的10%。利用选定年份的行政联邦税务数据全集，我们表明，婴儿期的这种转移使年轻成年人的收入至少增加1%至2%，对男性的影响更大。这些影响在更早的年龄就显现出来，表现为数学和阅读考试成绩的提高以及高中毕业可能性的增加。观察到的对短期父母结果的影响表明，在第一个孩子出生后的关键窗口期内，额外的流动性导致家庭收入的持续增长，这很可能促成了对孩子结果的后续影响。仅对孩子收入的长期影响就足够大，以至于通过随后联邦所得税收入的增加，转移支付本身就能收回成本。
30373.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H02, H24, H31, I2, I21, I3, I38, J13, J24, J62

30372.title: Material Incentives and Effort Choice: Evidence from an Online Experiment Across Countries
30372.zh_title: 物质激励与努力选择：来自一项跨国在线实验的证据
30372.abstract: We conduct an interactive online experiment framed as an employment contract between employer and worker. Subjects from the US, India, and Africa are matched in pairs within and, in some cases, across countries. Employers make a one-period offer to a worker who can either decline or choose a high or low effort. The offer is restricted to be from a variable set of possible contracts: high and low fixed wage; bonus and malus contracts; and bonus and malus with reneging. High effort is always efficient. Self-interest predicts a fraction of observed choices, but many choices are better explained either by conditional reciprocity or by intrinsic motivation. Subjects from India and Africa are more likely to follow intrinsic motivation and they provide high effort more often. US subjects are more likely to follow self-interest and reach a less efficient outcome on average, but workers earn slightly more. We find no evidence that workers favor employers from some countries or that employers treat workers from different countries differently. Individual characteristics and stated attitudes toward worker incentives are unable to predict the behavioral differences observed between countries, thus allowing the possible existence of cultural differences in the response to labor incentives.
30372.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一项交互式在线实验，框架为雇主与工人之间的雇佣合同。来自美国、印度和非洲的受试者在国内以及某些情况下跨国配对。雇主向工人提供一个单期要约，工人可以拒绝或选择高努力或低努力。该要约被限制在一组可变的可能合同中：高固定工资和低固定工资；奖金和罚金合同；以及带有违约的奖金和罚金合同。高努力总是有效率的。自利预测了观察到的选择的一部分，但许多选择要么由条件互惠，要么由内在动机更好地解释。来自印度和非洲的受试者更可能遵循内在动机，并且他们更经常提供高努力。美国受试者更可能遵循自利，平均而言达到的效率较低的结果，但工人赚得略多。我们没有发现证据表明工人偏爱来自某些国家的雇主，或者雇主区别对待来自不同国家的工人。个人特征和对工人激励的陈述态度无法预测国家之间观察到的行为差异，从而允许在劳动激励反应方面可能存在文化差异。

30371.title: Real-Time Poverty, Material Well-Being, and the Child Tax Credit
30371.zh_title: 实时贫困、物质福祉与儿童税收抵免
30371.authors: Jeehoon Han, Bruce D. Meyer, James X. Sullivan
30371.abstract: In response to the COVID-19 pandemic two new timely poverty measures have been developed to monitor fast-changing economic conditions for the most deprived. The Han et al. near real-time poverty measure uses responses to a global income question on the Monthly Current Population Survey (CPS) that is available for a subsample of those surveyed. The CPSP monthly poverty measure, widely cited in the media, uses data from the Annual Social and Economic Supplement to the CPS and other sources to impute poverty in the Monthly CPS sample based on demographic and employment variables. This paper evaluates the two measures and their estimates of child poverty around the 2021 temporary changes to the Child Tax Credit (CTC). We argue that conceptually the measure based on responses rather than the one based on imputations is preferable, though both measures suffer from important drawbacks. We also conclude that widely publicized claims that child poverty fell by 25 percent when the Advance CTC payments started and subsequently rose by 41 percent when they ended are based on weak evidence and are overstated. The best evidence, though still imperfect, suggests poverty was relatively stable in 2021 and the first half of 2022. Part of the explanation for the lack of change appears to be a compensating decline in employment among low-skilled workers with children. Other evidence tying changes in well-being to the tax credit is confounded by other policy changes.
30371.zh_abstract: 为应对COVID-19大流行，开发了两种新的及时贫困衡量指标，以监测最贫困人群快速变化的经济状况。Han等人的近实时贫困衡量指标使用了月度当前人口调查中一个全球收入问题的回答，该问题仅对调查子样本可用。媒体广泛引用的CPSP月度贫困衡量指标，则利用当前人口调查年度社会和经济补充数据及其他来源，基于人口和就业变量在月度当前人口调查样本中推算贫困。本文评估了这两种衡量指标及其对2021年儿童税收抵免临时变更前后儿童贫困的估计。我们认为，从概念上讲，基于回答的衡量指标优于基于推算的衡量指标，尽管两种衡量指标都存在重要缺陷。我们还得出结论，广泛宣传的关于提前儿童税收抵免支付开始时儿童贫困下降25%以及支付结束时儿童贫困上升41%的说法，基于薄弱的证据且被夸大。最佳证据（尽管仍不完美）表明，贫困在2021年和2022年上半年相对稳定。缺乏变化的部分解释似乎是带孩子的低技能工人就业的补偿性下降。其他将福祉变化与税收抵免联系起来的证据则与其他政策变化相混淆。
30371.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：C42, C81, H2, I32, I38, J20

30370.title: Patterns, Determinants, and Consequences of Ability Tracking: Evidence from Texas Public Schools
30370.zh_title: 能力分班的模式、决定因素与后果：来自德克萨斯州公立学校的证据
30370.authors: Kate Antonovics, Sandra E. Black, Julie Berry Cullen, Akiva Yonah Meiselman
30370.abstract: Little is known about the pervasiveness or determinants of within-school ability tracking in the US. To fill this gap, we use detailed administrative data to estimate the extent of tracking in Texas public schools for grades 4 through 8 over the years 2011-2019. Strikingly, we find that ability tracking across classes within schools overwhelms sorting by ability across districts and schools, as well as sorting by race/ethnicity or economic disadvantage. We also examine how schools operationalize tracking as well as the local characteristics that predict tracking. Finally, we explore how exposure to tracking (and the bundle of associated practices) relates to achievement gains, finding that, on average, tracking increases inequality by slightly improving test scores of higher-achieving students without harming those of lower-achieving students.
30370.zh_abstract: 关于美国校内能力分班的普遍性或决定因素，人们知之甚少。为填补这一空白，我们利用详细的行政数据，估算了2011-2019年间德克萨斯州4至8年级公立学校中能力分班的程度。引人注目的是，我们发现校内跨班级的能力分班远远超过了跨学区和学校的能力分班，以及按种族/族裔或经济劣势的分班。我们还考察了学校如何实施能力分班，以及预测能力分班的地方特征。最后，我们探讨了接触能力分班（及其相关实践组合）与学业成绩提升之间的关系，发现平均而言，能力分班通过略微提高成绩较高学生的考试成绩而不损害成绩较低学生，从而加剧了不平等。

30369.title: One Size Doesn’t Fit All: Heterogeneous Depositor Compensation During Periods of Uncertainty
30369.zh_title: 一刀切并不适用：不确定性时期异质性存款人的补偿
30369.authors: Nikolaos Artavanis, Daniel Paravisini, Claudia Robles Garcia, Amit Seru, Margarita Tsoutsoura
30369.abstract: We develop a new approach to identify different categories of depositors during periods of uncertainty and quantify their compensation to remain in the bank. We isolate withdrawals due to liquidity needs, deterioration of fundamentals, and expectation about withdrawal behavior of other depositors. We exploit variation in the cost of withdrawal induced by the maturity expiration of time deposits around unexpected uncertainty events and high-frequency microdata from a large Greek bank. Deposit withdrawals quadrupled in response to a policy uncertainty shock that doubled the short-run credit default swap (CDS) price of Greek sovereign bonds. About two-thirds of this increase is driven by direct exposure to deteriorating fundamentals, and the remainder due to strategic complementarities. We find that depositors need to be offered annualized returns exceeding 50% to remain in the bank during episodes of high uncertainty. Our findings provide new insights into the design of interventions that prevent runs by targeting depositors with the largest propensity to withdraw.
30369.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种新方法，用于识别不确定性时期不同类别的存款人，并量化他们留在银行所需的补偿。我们分离了因流动性需求、基本面恶化以及对其他存款人提款行为的预期所导致的提款。我们利用定期存款到期时间在意外不确定性事件周围产生的提款成本变化，以及一家大型希腊银行的高频微观数据。在政策不确定性冲击使希腊主权债券的短期信用违约互换价格翻倍后，存款提款增加了四倍。这一增长中约三分之二由对基本面恶化的直接暴露驱动，其余部分则源于策略互补性。我们发现，在高不确定性时期，存款人需要获得超过50%的年化回报率才能留在银行。我们的发现为设计针对具有最大提款倾向的存款人的干预措施以防止银行挤兑提供了新见解。

30368.title: The Slaughter of the Bison and Reversal of Fortunes on the Great Plains
30368.zh_title: 野牛屠杀与大平原地区的命运逆转
30368.authors: Donn. L. Feir, Rob Gillezeau, Maggie E.C. Jones
30368.abstract: In the late nineteenth century, the North American bison was brought to the brink of extinction in just over a decade. We demonstrate that the loss of the bison had immediate, negative consequences for the Native Americans who relied on them and ultimately resulted in a permanent reversal of fortunes. Once amongst the tallest people in the world, the generations of bison-reliant people born after the slaughter lost their entire height advantage. By the early twentieth century, child mortality was 16 percentage points higher and the probability of reporting an occupation 29.7 percentage points lower in bison nations compared to nations that were never reliant on the bison. Throughout the latter half of the twentieth century and into the present, income per capita has remained 28 percent lower, on average, for bison nations. This persistent gap cannot be explained by differences in agricultural productivity, self-governance, or application of the Dawes Act. We provide evidence that this historical shock altered the dynamic path of development for formerly bison-reliant nations. We demonstrate that limited access to credit constrained the ability of bison nations to adjust through respecialization and migration.
30368.zh_abstract: 在19世纪末，北美野牛在短短十多年间濒临灭绝。我们证明，野牛的丧失对依赖它们的原住民产生了直接的负面后果，并最终导致了命运的永久逆转。曾经是世界上最高的人群之一，在屠杀后出生的依赖野牛的一代人完全失去了身高优势。到20世纪初，与从未依赖野牛的民族相比，野牛民族中儿童死亡率高出16个百分点，报告职业的概率低29.7个百分点。在20世纪下半叶直至现在，野牛民族的人均收入平均仍低28%。这一持续差距无法用农业生产力、自治或道斯法案的实施差异来解释。我们提供的证据表明，这一历史冲击改变了原先依赖野牛民族的发展动态路径。我们证明，有限的信贷获取限制了野牛民族通过重新专业化和迁移进行调整的能力。

30367.title: Trickle-Down Effects of Affirmative Action: A Case Study in France
30367.zh_title: 平权行动的涓滴效应：法国的案例研究
30367.abstract: The introduction of a quota in the French chess Club Championship in 1990, an activity many players engage in next to playing in individual tournaments, provides a quite unique environment to study its effects on three levels. We find that women selected by the quota improve their performance. We show large spillover and trickle-down effects: There are more and better qualified women. International comparisons confirm that the results are unique to France and that there are no substantial adverse effects on French male players. We discuss the properties of this quota and how to implement it in other environments.
30367.zh_abstract: 1990年法国国际象棋俱乐部锦标赛引入配额制，这是一项许多棋手在参加个人锦标赛之外参与的活动，为研究其三个层面的影响提供了相当独特的环境。我们发现，通过配额选拔的女性提高了她们的表现。我们展示了巨大的溢出和涓滴效应：有更多且更优秀的女性棋手。国际比较证实，这些结果仅出现在法国，并且对法国男性棋手没有实质性的不利影响。我们讨论了这一配额的性质以及如何在其他环境中实施它。

30366.title: How and When are High-Frequency Stock Returns Predictable?
30366.zh_title: 高频股票收益在何时以及如何可预测？
30366.authors: Yacine Aït-Sahalia, Jianqing Fan, Lirong Xue, Yifeng Zhou
30366.abstract: This paper studies the predictability of ultra high-frequency stock returns and durations to relevant price, volume and transactions events, using machine learning methods. We find that, contrary to low frequency and long horizon returns, where predictability is rare and inconsistent, predictability in high frequency returns and durations is large, systematic and pervasive over short horizons. We identify the relevant predictors constructed from trades and quotes data and examine what determines the variation in predictability across different stock's own characteristics and market environments. Next, we compute how the predictability improves with the timeliness of the data on a scale of milliseconds, providing a valuation of each millisecond gained. Finally, we simulate the impact of getting an (imperfect) peek at the incoming order flow, a look ahead ability that is often attributed to the fastest high frequency traders, in terms of improving the predictability of the following returns and durations.
30366.zh_abstract: 本文利用机器学习方法，研究了超高频股票收益以及到相关价格、成交量和交易事件持续时间的可预测性。我们发现，与低频和长期收益中可预测性罕见且不一致相反，高频收益和持续时间的可预测性在短期是显著的、系统性的且普遍的。我们识别了从交易和报价数据构建的相关预测因子，并考察了不同股票自身特征和市场环境中可预测性变化的决定因素。接下来，我们计算了可预测性如何随着数据在毫秒级别上的及时性而改善，从而为每获得一毫秒提供估值。最后，我们模拟了（不完美地）窥视即将到来的订单流（一种常被归因于最快高频交易者的前瞻能力）对提高后续收益和持续时间可预测性的影响。
30366.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C45, C53, C58, G12, G14, G17

30365.title: Estimating Labor Market Power
30365.authors: José A. Azar, Steven T. Berry, Ioana Marinescu
30365.abstract: Job differentiation gives employers market power, allowing them to pay workers less than their marginal productivity. We estimate a differentiated jobs model using application data from Careerbuilder.com. We find direct evidence of substantial job differentiation. Without the use of instruments for wages, job applications appear very inelastic with respect to wages. Plausible instruments produce elastic firm-level application supply curves. Under some assumptions, the implied market level labor supply elasticity is 0.5, while the firm level labor elasticity is 4.8. This suggests that workers may produce 21% more than their wage level, consistent with significant monopsony power.
30365.zh_abstract: 工作差异化赋予雇主市场势力，使他们能够支付给工人低于其边际生产力的工资。我们使用来自CareerBuilder.com的申请数据估计了一个差异化工作模型。我们发现了工作差异化的直接证据。在没有使用工资工具变量的情况下，工作申请对工资显得非常缺乏弹性。合理的工具变量产生了有弹性的企业层面申请供给曲线。在某些假设下，隐含的市场层面劳动力供给弹性为0.5，而企业层面劳动力弹性为4.8。这表明工人可能比其工资水平多生产21%，这与显著的买方垄断势力一致。

30364.title: What Makes a Program Good? Evidence from Short-Cycle Higher Education Programs in Five Developing Countries
30364.zh_title: 什么造就了一个好项目？来自五个发展中国家短期高等教育项目的证据
30364.authors: Lelys I. Dinarte Diaz, Maria Marta Ferreyra, Sergio S. Urzúa, Marina Bassi
30364.abstract: Short-cycle higher education programs (SCPs) can play a central role in skill development and higher education expansion, yet their quality varies greatly within and among countries. In this paper we explore the relationship between programs’ practices and inputs (quality determinants) and student academic and labor market outcomes. We design and conduct a novel survey to collect program-level information on quality determinants and average outcomes for Brazil, Colombia, Dominican Republic, Ecuador, and Peru. Categories of quality determinants include training and curriculum, infrastructure, faculty, link with productive sector, costs and funding, and other practices on student admission and institutional governance. We also collect administrative, student-level data on higher education and formal employment for SCP students in Brazil and Ecuador and match it to survey data. Using machine learning methods, we select the quality determinants that predict outcomes at the program and student levels. Estimates indicate that some quality determinants may favor academic and labor market outcomes while others may hinder them. Two practices predict improvements in all labor market outcomes in Brazil and Ecuador—teaching numerical competencies and providing job market information—and one practice—teaching numerical competencies—additionally predicts improvements in labor market outcomes for all survey countries. Since quality determinants account for 20-40 percent of the explained variation in student-level outcomes, estimates indicate a role for quality determinants to shrink the quality gap among programs. These findings have implications for the design and replication of high-quality SCPs, their regulation, and the development of information systems.
30364.zh_abstract: 短期高等教育项目可以在技能发展和高等教育扩张中发挥核心作用，但其质量在国家内部和国家之间差异很大。在本文中，我们探讨了项目的实践和投入（质量决定因素）与学生学业和劳动力市场结果之间的关系。我们设计并实施了一项新颖的调查，以收集巴西、哥伦比亚、多米尼加共和国、厄瓜多尔和秘鲁的项目层面质量决定因素和平均结果信息。质量决定因素的类别包括培训与课程、基础设施、师资、与生产部门的联系、成本与资金，以及学生录取和机构治理的其他实践。我们还收集了巴西和厄瓜多尔短期高等教育项目学生的高等教育和正规就业的行政层面学生数据，并将其与调查数据匹配。使用机器学习方法，我们选择了在项目和学生层面预测结果的质量决定因素。估计表明，一些质量决定因素可能有利于学业和劳动力市场结果，而另一些则可能阻碍它们。在巴西和厄瓜多尔，两种实践预测了所有劳动力市场结果的改善——教授数字能力和提供就业市场信息——而一种实践（教授数字能力）还额外预测了所有调查国家劳动力市场结果的改善。由于质量决定因素解释了学生层面结果变异的20-40%，估计表明质量决定因素在缩小项目间质量差距方面发挥作用。这些发现对高质量短期高等教育项目的设计和复制、其监管以及信息系统的开发具有启示意义。

30363.title: Stress, Ethnicity, and Prosocial Behavior
30363.zh_title: 压力、种族与亲社会行为
30363.authors: Johannes Haushofer, Sara Lowes, Abednego Musau, David M. Ndetei, Nathan Nunn, Moritz Poll, Nancy Qian
30363.abstract: While observational evidence suggests that people behave more prosocially towards members of their own ethnic group, many laboratory studies fail to find this effect. One possible explanation is that coethnic preference only emerges during times of stress. To test this hypothesis, we pharmacologically increase levels of the stress hormone cortisol, after which participants complete laboratory experiments with coethnics and noncoethnics. We find mixed evidence that increased cortisol decreases prosocial behavior. Coethnic preferences do not vary with cortisol. However, in contrast to previous studies, we find strong and robust evidence of coethnic preference.
30363.zh_abstract: 虽然观察性证据表明，人们对自己种族群体的成员表现出更多的亲社会行为，但许多实验室研究未能发现这种效应。一种可能的解释是，同族偏好仅在压力时期出现。为检验这一假设，我们通过药理学方法提高压力激素皮质醇的水平，之后参与者与同族和异族成员一起完成实验室实验。我们发现，皮质醇增加会减少亲社会行为的证据不一。同族偏好不随皮质醇水平变化。然而，与以往研究相反，我们发现了强烈且稳健的同族偏好证据。

30362.title: Of Academics and Creative Destruction: Startup Advantage in the Process of Innovation
30362.zh_title: 学术与创造性破坏：初创企业在创新过程中的优势
30362.authors: Julian Kolev, Alexis Haughey, Fiona Murray, Scott Stern
30362.abstract: What is the role of startups within the innovation ecosystem? Since 2000, startups have grown in their share of commercializing research from top U.S. universities; however, prior work has little to say on the particular advantages of startup ventures in the innovation process relative to more traditional alternatives such as academia and established private-sector incumbents. We develop a simple model of startup advantage based on private information held by the initial inventor, and generate predictions related to the value and impact of startup innovation. We then explore these predictions using patents granted within the regional ecosystems of top-25 research universities from 2000 to 2015. Our results show a significant startup advantage in terms of forward citations and outlier-patent rates. Further, startup innovation is both more original and more general than innovation by incumbent firms. Moreover, startups that survive to become “scale-ups” quickly grow to dominate their regional innovation ecosystems. Our findings have important implications for innovation policy.
30362.zh_abstract: 初创企业在创新生态系统中扮演什么角色？自2000年以来，初创企业在商业化美国顶尖大学研究成果中所占份额有所增长；然而，先前的研究很少论及初创企业在创新过程中相对于更传统的替代方案（如学术界和成熟的私营部门在位企业）所具有的特定优势。我们基于初始发明人持有的私人信息，构建了一个简单的初创企业优势模型，并生成了与初创企业创新的价值和影响相关的预测。然后，我们利用2000年至2015年间美国排名前25的研究型大学区域生态系统内授权的专利来探索这些预测。我们的结果显示，在向前引用和异常专利率方面，初创企业具有显著优势。此外，与在位企业的创新相比，初创企业的创新更具原创性和通用性。而且，那些存活下来并成长为“规模化企业”的初创企业，会迅速主导其区域创新生态系统。我们的发现对创新政策具有重要启示。
30362.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：L24, L26, M13, O31, O32, O34

30361.title: Does Environmental Policy Uncertainty Hinder Investments Towards a Low-Carbon Economy?
30361.zh_title: 环境政策不确定性是否会阻碍对低碳经济的投资？
30361.authors: Joelle Noailly, Laura Nowzohour, Matthias van den Heuvel
30361.abstract: We use machine learning algorithms to construct a novel news-based index of US environmental and climate policy uncertainty (EnvPU) available on a monthly basis over the 1990-2019 period. We find that our EnvPU index spikes during the environmental spending disputes of the 1995-1996 government shutdown, in the early 2010s due the failure of the national cap-and-trade climate bill and during the Trump presidency. We examine how elevated levels of environmental policy uncertainty relate to investments in the low-carbon economy. In firm-level estimations, we find that a rise in the EnvPU index is associated with a reduced probability for cleantech startups to receive venture capital (VC) funding. In financial markets, a rise in our EnvPU index is associated with higher stock volatility for firms with above-average green revenue shares. At the macro level, shocks in our index lead to declines in the number of cleantech VC deals and higher volatility of the main benchmark clean energy exchange-traded fund. Overall, our results are consistent with the notion that policy uncertainty has adverse effects on investments for the low-carbon economy.
30361.zh_abstract: 我们使用机器学习算法构建了一个基于新闻的美国环境和气候政策不确定性指数（EnvPU），该指数在1990年至2019年期间按月提供。我们发现，我们的EnvPU指数在1995-1996年政府停摆期间的环境支出争议、2010年代初因全国性总量控制与交易气候法案失败以及特朗普总统任期内出现飙升。我们考察了环境政策不确定性水平升高与低碳经济投资之间的关系。在企业层面的估计中，我们发现EnvPU指数的上升与清洁技术初创企业获得风险投资（VC）融资的概率降低相关。在金融市场中，我们的EnvPU指数上升与绿色收入份额高于平均水平的公司股票波动性增加相关。在宏观层面，我们指数的冲击导致清洁技术风险投资交易数量下降，以及主要基准清洁能源交易所交易基金的波动性增加。总体而言，我们的结果与政策不确定性对低碳经济投资产生不利影响的观点一致。

30360.title: Do Collusive Norms Maximize Profits? Evidence from a Vegetable Market Experiment in India
30360.zh_title: 合谋规范能最大化利润吗？来自印度蔬菜市场实验的证据
30360.authors: Abhijit Banerjee, Greg Fischer, Dean Karlan, Matt Lowe, Benjamin N. Roth
30360.abstract: Social norms have been shown to facilitate anti-competitive behavior in decentralized markets. We demonstrate these norms can also reduce aggregate profits. First, we present descriptive evidence of competition-suppressing norms in Kolkata vegetable markets. We then report on a market-level experiment in which we induced a temporary relaxation of these norms by subsidizing some vendors to sell additional produce. Our intervention raised profits at the market level by over 60%, excluding the subsidy. Nevertheless, after the subsidy ended vendors largely stopped selling the additional produce. Our results suggest anti-competitive norms may partially explain the pervasiveness of small-scale firms in developing countries.
30360.zh_abstract: 社会规范已被证明会助长分散市场中的反竞争行为。我们证明这些规范也可能降低总利润。首先，我们提供了加尔各答蔬菜市场中抑制竞争规范的描述性证据。接着，我们报告了一项市场层面的实验，在该实验中，我们通过补贴部分供应商销售额外产品，诱导这些规范暂时放松。我们的干预措施使市场层面的利润提高了60%以上（不包括补贴）。然而，补贴结束后，供应商大多停止了额外产品的销售。我们的结果表明，反竞争规范可能部分解释了发展中国家小规模企业普遍存在的原因。

30399.title: The Steering Incentives of Gatekeepers in the Telecommunications Industry
30399.zh_title: 电信行业守门人的引导激励
30399.authors: Brian McManus, Aviv Nevo, Zachary Nolan, Jonathan W. Williams
30399.abstract: We study trade-offs faced by multiple-system operators (MSOs), the gatekeepers in the provision of internet service, when setting prices and quality for internet access and TV service. In response to improvements in over-the-top video (OTT), MSOs choose between accommodating OTT to share in the surplus it provides consumers, or steering consumers towards TV. We augment the standard mixed bundling model to show that in some cases MSOs have incentives to steer consumers towards TV, but that these incentives vary with the available pricing tools. We then estimate the distribution of model parameters using household panel data on subscription choices and internet usage. Our estimates imply that if MSOs can set different prices for different internet content, under many cost circumstances MSOs discount the OTT usage price. Furthermore, we find that the ability to charge prices based on internet usage strengthens the MSOs' incentive to improve OTT quality.
30399.zh_abstract: 我们研究了多系统运营商（MSO）——互联网服务提供中的守门人——在设定互联网接入和电视服务的价格与质量时所面临的权衡。为应对OTT视频的改进，MSO选择要么适应OTT以分享其为消费者带来的剩余，要么将消费者引导至电视。我们扩展了标准混合捆绑模型，以表明在某些情况下MSO有激励将消费者引导至电视，但这些激励因可用的定价工具而异。然后，我们利用关于订阅选择和互联网使用的家庭面板数据来估计模型参数的分布。我们的估计表明，如果MSO能够为不同的互联网内容设定不同的价格，在许多成本情况下，MSO会降低OTT使用价格。此外，我们发现，基于互联网使用量收费的能力增强了MSO改善OTT质量的激励。

30398.title: Assessing External Validity in Practice
30398.zh_title: 实践中评估外部有效性
30398.abstract: We review, from a practical standpoint, the evolving literature on assessing external validity (EV) of estimated treatment effects. We review existing EV measures, and focus on methods that permit multiple datasets (Hotz et al., 2005). We outline criteria for practical usage, evaluate the existing approaches, and identify a gap in potential methods. Our practical considerations motivate a novel method utilizing the Group Lasso (Yuan and Lin, 2006) to estimate a tractable regression-based model of the conditional average treatment effect (CATE). This approach can perform better when settings have differing covariate distributions and allows for easily extrapolating the average treatment effect to new settings. We apply these measures to a set of identical field experiments upgrading slum dwellings in three different countries (Galiani et al., 2017).
30398.zh_abstract: 我们从实践角度回顾了关于评估估计处理效应外部有效性（EV）的不断发展的文献。我们回顾了现有的EV度量方法，并重点关注允许使用多个数据集的方法（Hotz等人，2005）。我们概述了实际使用的标准，评估了现有方法，并指出了潜在方法中的空白。我们的实践考量催生了一种新方法，该方法利用Group Lasso（Yuan和Lin，2006）来估计一个易于处理的条件平均处理效应（CATE）的回归模型。当不同设定具有不同的协变量分布时，这种方法可能表现更好，并且允许轻松地将平均处理效应外推到新设定。我们将这些度量应用于一组在三个不同国家（Galiani等人，2017）进行的、旨在升级贫民窟住宅的相同实地实验。

30397.title: Boomerang College Kids: Unemployment, Job Mismatch and Coresidence
30397.zh_title: 回巢的大学生：失业、工作错配与同住
30397.authors: Stefania Albanesi, Rania Gihleb, Ning Zhang
30397.abstract: Labor market outcomes for young college graduates have deteriorated substantially in the last twenty five years, and more of them are residing with their parents. The unemployment rate at 23-27 year old for the 1996 college graduation cohort was 9%, whereas it rose to 12% for the 2013 graduation cohort. While only 25% of the 1996 cohort lived with their parents, 31% for the 2013 cohort chose this option. Our hypothesis is that the declining availability of ‘matched jobs’ that require a college degree is a key factor behind these developments. Using a structurally estimated model of child-parent decisions, in which coresidence improves college graduates' quality of job matches, we find that lower matched job arrival rates explain two thirds of the rise in unemployment and coresidence between the 2013 and 1996 graduation cohorts. Rising wage dispersion is also important for the increase in unemployment, while declining parental income, rising student loan balances and higher rental costs only play a marginal role.
30397.zh_abstract: 在过去二十五年中，年轻大学毕业生的劳动力市场结果显著恶化，更多的人与父母同住。1996年毕业的23-27岁人群失业率为9%，而2013年毕业的人群则升至12%。1996年毕业人群中只有25%与父母同住，而2013年毕业人群中有31%选择了这一选项。我们的假设是，需要大学学位的“匹配工作”机会减少是这些变化背后的关键因素。通过使用一个结构估计的子女-父母决策模型（其中同住改善了大学毕业生的工作匹配质量），我们发现，较低的匹配工作到达率解释了2013年与1996年毕业人群之间失业率和同住率上升的三分之二。工资离散度的上升对失业率的增加也很重要，而父母收入下降、学生贷款余额增加以及租金成本上升仅起边际作用。
30397.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：D1, E20, J01, J23, J3

30396.title: Top Wealth in America: A Reexamination
30396.abstract: Recent estimates of US top wealth shares obtained by capitalizing income tax returns (Saez and Zucman, 2020; Smith, Zidar and Zwick, 2022) are close in both levels and trends except for the top 0.01% where a large discrepancy remains. We examine this difference and, using public data, quantify three main issues in Smith et al. (2022). First, Securities and Exchange Commission data at the shareholder firm level show that billionaires' equity wealth is underestimated by a factor of 2.1. Second, interest-bearing assets at the top are under-estimated by a factor of 1.6, because of an extrapolation from a small and unrepresentative sample of investment funds. We quantify this issue using mandatory filings of US hedge funds. Third, issues involving tiered partnerships and the measurement of business profits suggest that large S-corporations are undervalued by a factor of 1.2 and top-owned partnerships by up to 2.2. After incorporating these results, the top 0.01% wealth share of Smith et al. (2022) is close to the one found in Saez and Zucman (2020) and estimates of US wealth inequality are reconciled.
30396.zh_abstract: 最近通过资本化所得税申报表获得的美国顶级财富份额估计（Saez和Zucman，2020；Smith，Zidar和Zwick，2022）在水平和趋势上都接近，除了前0.01%的群体，其中仍存在巨大差异。我们研究了这一差异，并利用公开数据量化了Smith等人（2022）中的三个主要问题。首先，股东公司层面的证券交易委员会数据显示，亿万富翁的股权财富被低估了2.1倍。其次，顶层的利息资产被低估了1.6倍，这是因为从一个规模小且不具代表性的投资基金样本进行了外推。我们利用美国对冲基金的强制性申报文件量化了这一问题。第三，涉及分层合伙企业和企业利润衡量的问题表明，大型S公司被低估了1.2倍，顶层拥有的合伙企业被低估了高达2.2倍。在纳入这些结果后，Smith等人（2022）中前0.01%的财富份额接近Saez和Zucman（2020）中的发现，美国财富不平等估计得以协调。

30395.title: Popular Personal Financial Advice versus the Professors
30395.zh_title: 流行的个人理财建议与教授们的观点
30395.abstract: I survey the advice given by the fifty most popular personal finance books and compare it to the prescriptions of normative academic economic models. Popular advice frequently departs from normative principles derived from economic theory, which should motivate new hypotheses about why households make the financial choices they do, as well as what financial choices households should make. Popular advice is sometimes driven by fallacies, but it tries to take into account the limited willpower individuals have to stick to a financial plan, and its recommended actions are often easily computable by ordinary individuals. I cover advice on savings rates, the advisability of being a wealthy hand-to-mouth consumer, asset allocation, non-mortgage debt management, simultaneous holding of high-interest debt and low-interest savings, and mortgage choices.
30395.zh_abstract: 我调查了五十本最受欢迎的个人理财书籍给出的建议，并将其与规范性学术经济模型的处方进行比较。流行的建议经常偏离源于经济理论的规范性原则，这应激发关于家庭为何做出其财务选择以及家庭应做出何种财务选择的新假设。流行的建议有时源于谬误，但它试图考虑个人坚持财务计划的有限意志力，并且其推荐行动通常易于普通人计算。我涵盖的建议涉及储蓄率、成为富裕的手头拮据消费者的可取性、资产配置、非抵押贷款债务管理、同时持有高息债务和低息储蓄以及抵押贷款选择。
30395.meta: Programs：AG, AP；JEL：D14, D15, G11, G4, G5

30394.title: The Small Open Economy in a Generalized Gravity Model
30394.zh_title: 一般化引力模型中的小型开放经济体
30394.authors: Svetlana Demidova, Konstantin Kucheryavyy, Takumi Naito, Andrés Rodríguez-Clare
30394.abstract: To provide sharp answers to basic questions in international trade, a standard approach is to focus on a small open economy (SOE). Whereas the classic tradition is to define a SOE as an economy that takes world prices as given, in the new trade literature it is defined instead as one that takes foreign-good prices and export demand schedules as given. We develop a gravity model that nests all its standard microfoundations and show how to take the limit so that an economy that becomes infinitesimally small behaves like a SOE. We then derive comparative statics and optimal policy for the SOE. Ignoring standard tax indeterminacies, optimal policy is characterized by export taxes and import tariffs equal to the (inverse) foreign demand and supply elasticities, respectively, and employment subsidies determined by the scale elasticity (under perfect competition) or markups (under monopolistic competition).
30394.zh_abstract: 为了对国际贸易中的基本问题提供清晰的答案，标准方法是聚焦于小型开放经济体（SOE）。经典传统将SOE定义为将世界价格视为给定的经济体，而在新贸易文献中，SOE则被定义为将外国商品价格和出口需求计划视为给定的经济体。我们开发了一个引力模型，该模型包含了所有标准的微观基础，并展示了如何取极限，使得一个变得无穷小的经济体表现得像SOE。然后，我们推导了SOE的比较静态分析和最优政策。忽略标准的税收不确定性，最优政策的特征是出口税和进口关税分别等于（逆）外国需求弹性和供给弹性，以及由规模弹性（在完全竞争下）或加成率（在垄断竞争下）决定的就业补贴。

30393.title: Vote Early and Vote Often? Detecting Electoral Fraud from the Timing of 19th Century Elections
30393.zh_title: 早投票与多投票？从19世纪选举时间检测选举舞弊
30393.abstract: This paper develops a new approach to detecting electoral fraud. Our context involves repeaters, individuals voting in multiple states in the U.S. during 19th Century Congressional Elections. Given high travel times, and the associated difficulties of voting in multiple states on the same day, we exploit the staggered introduction of holding federal elections on the first Tuesday after the first Monday in November (1T1M). The key finding is that county-level turnout rates fell when the closest neighboring state coordinated on 1T1M. This result is consistent with 1T1M adoption making repeating more difficult. In terms of mechanisms, the pattern is stronger in states that had not yet adopted the secret ballot, consistent with the secret ballot itself reducing voter fraud. The pattern is also driven by smaller population counties, consistent with repeaters particularly inflating turnout rates in these places.
30393.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一种检测选举舞弊的新方法。我们的背景涉及重复投票者，即在美国19世纪国会选举中在多个州投票的个人。鉴于旅行时间长以及在同一天在多个州投票的相关困难，我们利用了联邦选举在11月第一个星期一之后的第一个星期二（1T1M）举行的交错引入。关键发现是，当最近的相邻州协调采用1T1M时，县级投票率下降。这一结果与1T1M的采用使重复投票更加困难相一致。在机制方面，这种模式在尚未采用无记名投票的州更为明显，这与无记名投票本身减少选民舞弊相一致。这种模式也由人口较少的县驱动，这与重复投票者特别抬高了这些地方的投票率相一致。
30393.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D70, H7, P0

30392.title: The First Sale Doctrine and the Digital Challenge to Public Libraries
30392.zh_title: 首次销售原则与公共图书馆面临的数字挑战
30392.abstract: Libraries have traditionally provided free communal access to books, facilitated by the first sale doctrine's (FSD) guarantee that libraries may purchase physical books at consumer prices. Increasingly restrictive ebook access terms may imperil libraries, and we compare the welfare cost of higher ebook prices to the welfare benefit of the FSD's guarantee of low physical book prices for libraries and their patrons. Using data on over 8,000 library systems for 2013-2019, we measure the impacts of physical and electronic holdings on the respective formats' circulation. We then build a structural model of the library market, and we rationalize the status quo book holdings with a librarian utility function that attaches higher weights to electronic circulation. While higher counterfactual ebook prices would induce libraries to substitute physical for electronic holdings, this would have little effect on patron CS because of consumer willingness to substitute. By contrast, higher physical book prices, as would prevail absent the first sale doctrine, reduce CS by almost ten times as much as an analogous ebook price increase.
30392.zh_abstract: 图书馆传统上提供免费的公共图书借阅服务，这得益于首次销售原则（FSD）保证图书馆可以按消费者价格购买实体书。日益严格的电子书访问条款可能危及图书馆，我们比较了更高电子书价格的福利成本与FSD保证图书馆及其读者获得低价实体书的福利收益。利用2013-2019年超过8000个图书馆系统的数据，我们衡量了实体和电子馆藏对各自格式流通量的影响。然后，我们构建了一个图书馆市场的结构模型，并用一个赋予电子流通更高权重的图书馆员效用函数来合理化现状下的图书馆藏。虽然反事实的更高电子书价格会促使图书馆用实体馆藏替代电子馆藏，但由于消费者愿意替代，这对消费者剩余影响很小。相比之下，如果没有首次销售原则，实体书价格会更高，这导致的消费者剩余减少几乎是类似电子书价格上涨的十倍。
30392.meta: Programs：ED, IO, LE, PE；JEL：H42, L82, O34

30391.title: The Governance of Non-Profits and their Social Impact: Evidence from a Randomized Program in Healthcare in the Democratic Republic of Congo
30391.zh_title: 非营利组织的治理及其社会影响：来自刚果民主共和国医疗保健随机项目的证据
30391.authors: Anicet Fangwa, Caroline Flammer, Marieke Huysentruyt, Bertrand Quelin
30391.abstract: Substantial funding is provided to the healthcare systems of low-income countries. However, an important challenge is to ensure that this funding be used efficiently. This challenge is complicated by the fact that a large share of healthcare services in low-income countries is provided by non-profit health centers that often lack i) effective governance structures and ii) organizational know-how and adequate training. In this paper, we argue that the bundling of performance-based incentives with auditing and feedback (A&F) is a potential way to overcome these obstacles. First, the combination of feedback and performance-based incentives—that is, feedback joint with incentives to act on this feedback and achieve specific health outcomes—helps address the knowledge gap that may otherwise undermine performance-based incentives. Second, coupling feedback with auditing helps ensure that the information underlying the feedback is reliable—a prerequisite for effective feedback. To examine the effectiveness of this bundle, we use data from a randomized governance program conducted in the Democratic Republic of Congo. Within the program, a set of health centers were randomly assigned to a “governance treatment” that consisted of performance-based incentives combined with A&F, while others were not. Consistent with our prediction, we find that the governance treatment led to i) higher operating efficiency and ii) improvements in health outcomes. Furthermore, we find that funding is not a substitute for the governance treatment—health centers that only receive funding increase their scale, but do not show improvements in operating efficiency nor health outcomes.
30391.zh_abstract: 大量资金被提供给低收入国家的医疗保健系统。然而，一个重要挑战是确保这些资金得到有效利用。这一挑战因低收入国家中很大一部分医疗服务由非营利性医疗中心提供而变得复杂，这些中心通常缺乏有效的治理结构以及组织知识和充分培训。在本文中，我们认为将基于绩效的激励与审计和反馈（A&F）捆绑在一起是克服这些障碍的一种潜在方式。首先，反馈与基于绩效的激励相结合——即反馈与采取行动实现特定健康结果的激励相结合——有助于解决可能削弱基于绩效的激励的知识差距。其次，将反馈与审计相结合有助于确保反馈所依据的信息可靠——这是有效反馈的先决条件。为了检验这种捆绑的有效性，我们使用了来自刚果民主共和国一个随机治理项目的数据。在该项目中，一组医疗中心被随机分配到“治理处理”组，该处理包括基于绩效的激励与A&F相结合，而其他医疗中心则没有。与我们的预测一致，我们发现治理处理导致了更高的运营效率和健康结果的改善。此外，我们发现资金不能替代治理处理——仅获得资金的医疗中心扩大了规模，但在运营效率或健康结果方面没有显示出改善。

30390.title: The Private Provision of Public Services: Evidence from Random Assignment in Medicaid
30390.zh_title: 公共服务的私人提供：来自医疗补助随机分配的证据
30390.authors: Danil Agafiev Macambira, Michael Geruso, Anthony Lollo, Chima D. Ndumele, Jacob Wallace
30390.abstract: This paper examines the effects of privatizing social health insurance. We exploit a natural experiment in Medicaid, wherein nearly 100,000 enrollees were randomly assigned between a publicly-operated fee-for-service system and private managed care. Managed care reduced costs by 5.6% via cost-effective substitutions within prescription drugs and via lower prices for outpatient services. We present evidence that pharmacy utilization management was the key mechanism reducing overuse and encouraging substitution to lower-cost drugs without decreasing quality. In contrast, privatizing medical benefits led to only modest savings and was associated with decreased healthcare quality and consumer satisfaction.
30390.zh_abstract: 本文考察了社会健康保险私有化的影响。我们利用医疗补助中的一项自然实验，其中近10万名参保者被随机分配到公共运营的按服务收费系统与私人管理式医疗之间。管理式医疗通过处方药中的成本效益替代以及门诊服务的更低价格，将成本降低了5.6%。我们提供的证据表明，药房利用管理是减少过度使用并鼓励转向低成本药物而不降低质量的关键机制。相比之下，医疗福利的私有化仅带来了适度的节省，并且与医疗保健质量和消费者满意度的下降相关。

30330.title: Depression and Loneliness Among the Elderly Poor
30330.zh_title: 老年贫困人口的抑郁与孤独感
30330.authors: Abhijit Banerjee, Esther Duflo, Erin Grela, Madeline McKelway, Frank Schilbach, Garima Sharma, Girija Vaidyanathan
30330.abstract: The mental health of the elderly in low- and middle-income countries (LMICs) is a largely neglected subject, both by policy and research. We combine data from the health and retirement family of surveys in seven LMICs (plus the US) to document that depressive symptoms among those aged 55 and above are more prevalent in those countries and increase sharply with age. Depressive symptoms in one survey wave are associated with a greater decline in functional abilities and higher probability of death in the next wave. Using data from a panel survey we conducted in Tamil Nadu with a focus on elderly living alone, we document that social isolation, poverty, and health challenges are three of the leading correlates of depression. We discuss potential policy interventions in these three domains, including some results from our randomized control trials in the Tamil Nadu sample.
30330.zh_abstract: 低收入和中等收入国家（LMICs）老年人的心理健康是一个在政策和研究方面都很大程度上被忽视的课题。我们结合了七个低收入和中等收入国家（加上美国）的健康与退休系列调查数据，记录到在这些国家中，55岁及以上人群的抑郁症状更为普遍，并且随年龄增长而急剧增加。一次调查波次中的抑郁症状与下一波次中功能能力下降幅度更大以及死亡概率更高相关。利用我们在泰米尔纳德邦进行的一项面板调查数据（重点关注独居老年人），我们记录了社会孤立、贫困和健康挑战是抑郁的三个主要相关因素。我们讨论了在这三个领域可能的政策干预措施，包括我们在泰米尔纳德邦样本中进行的随机对照试验的一些结果。
